disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | Friend,
---
| Last Friday, my friend and colleague Randy Feenstra set a goal to raise $10,000 before the end of the month to be spent mobilizing conservative voters across the district so we can elect Republican leaders that will deliver for Iowa.

In the past few days, we’ve seen overwhelming support from folks across the state that believe in our message and are ready for conservative leadership that will deliver real results for Iowa and America, and we need to keep that momentum going!

We have **one day left** to meet our goal, and we need your help.

Below I’ve listed some of the results that Randy and I delivered in the Iowa Senate, and I ask that for each of these that you support, you invest $1 to help get Randy and other conservative leaders elected:
1. The largest income tax cut in Iowa history
2. The heartbeat bill to protect the unborn
3. Expansion of Second Amendment rights
4. Defeating sanctuary cities
5. Passing voter ID
6. Defunding Planned Parenthood
7. Support for Iowa’s ethanol producers

With just a couple of dollars from everyone that supports or has benefitted from conservative leadership in the past, we can reach everyone in the Fourth District and turn out enough voters to win BIG on November 3rd and continue delivering results!

Only one day left – act fast and invest today!

---
| [Chip in here!](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=6ba7467ab7&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Chip in here!")
---
| Thank you!

-Senator Annette Sweeney

name: Miryam Lipper, Communications Director
subject: Fwd: Update on latest fundraising numbers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Check out this memo from our campaign manager |
---
Hi friend,

I just got this email from our campaign manager letting me know that **we still need to raise another $74,540 by tomorrow night to hit our big end-of-quarter goal!!**

Normally I'd write you a whole new email, but there's no time to waste, and I wanted to get in touch with you as soon as possible.

Mitch McConnell and his allies are funneling nearly $40 million into this race. **_If we don't hit this goal, we won't have the resources to be able to fight back._**

We can't let that happen, friend!

**[Can you rush a $20 donation TONIGHT to get us back on track so we can hit the goal, keep our ads running, and elect Jon Ossoff?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2edb/5b2c1286/3bb4c020/25f259e0/2845801494/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_29_m_e_fwd?refcode=em_2020_09_29_m_e_fwd&amount=20")**
| | [YES, I'LL DONATE $20!](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2edb/5b2c1286/3bb4c020/25f259e0/2845801494/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_29_m_e_fwd?refcode=em_2020_09_29_m_e_fwd&amount=20")
---
| [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2edb/5b2c1286/3bb4c020/25f259e3/2845801494/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_29_m_e_fwd?refcode=em_2020_09_29_m_e_fwd")
---

Thanks for your help,

Miryam Lipper
Communications Director
Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate

**\------- Begin forwarded message -------**

**From:** Ellen Foster
**To:** Miryam Lipper
**Date:** September 29, 2020
**Subject:** Update on latest fundraising numbers

Hey Miryam,

I wanted to update you on our fundraising numbers ahead of the Wednesday FEC deadline. The topline is ... we're behind. We still need to raise **another $74,540 by tomorrow night** to hit the EOQ goal.

Can you get an email out to our top supporters ASAP with this link to see if they can help us get back on track? **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_29_m_e_fwd?refcode=em_2020_09_29_m_e_fwd](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2edb/5b2c1286/3bb4c020/25f259e3/2845801494/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_29_m_e_fwd?refcode=em_2020_09_29_m_e_fwd")**

I'm confident that if every one of our top grassroots supporters **chips in $20, we'll reach our goal.**

You know how important this deadline is. We don't want to have to start cutting our FB ad spending.

Thanks,

Ellen

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: That was a ride
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5a362a1ca51a/that-was-a-ride?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | That debate was a mess.

The shouting. The name-calling. The lies. The disrespect.

When I say we need competent, compassionate leadership, I mean it. What we saw tonight from President Trump was a stunning lack of compassion.

The future of this democracy is at stake, and it is up to each of us to do what we can to protect it. I’m running for Congress to stand up for our democracy, and we need you.**Here are three things you can do right now:**
* Text 10 friends who might not show up this November - make sure they have a voting plan.
* Sign up to [phone bank](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=eb99fed865&e=140a9b81e7). There are still persuadable voters out there. Help us reach them.
* Donate to a campaign. Our link is [here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=4da2b16e44&e=140a9b81e7). There are lots of other races. Donate to them, too.

Let's fight back, together.
Dani

clean_body: | | | | | | | That debate was a mess. The shouting. The name-calling. The lies. The disrespect. When I say we need competent, compassionate leadership, I mean it. What we saw tonight from President Trump was a stunning lack of compassion. The future of this democracy is at stake, and it is up to each of us to do what we can to protect it. I’m running for Congress to stand up for our democracy, and we need you.Here are three things you can do right now: Text 10 friends who might not show up this November - make sure they have a voting plan. Sign up to . There are still persuadable voters out there. Help us reach them. Donate to a campaign. Our link is . There are lots of other races. Donate to them, too. Let's fight back, together. Dani | | | | | | | | | | | www.daniforillinois.com | | Copyright © 2020 Dani for Illinois, All rights reserved.

name: Team Hagerty
subject: Join #TeamHagerty For Tonight's Debate
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-e-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-ji/) September 29, 2020 **Join #TeamHagerty For Tonight's Presidential Debate** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-r/) Joe Biden will finally leave his basement and answer real questions without using a teleprompter or pre-screened talking points. Tonight, the American people will have the opportunity to compare Biden's public record, nearly 50 years full of empty promises and failed policies, to President Donald Trump's record over the last four years - a record of promises made and promises kept.Follow along with Bill during tonight's debate **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-y/)** **Confirm Judge Amy Coney Barrett Now** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-j/) Last week, President Donald Trump nominated Judge Amy Coney Barrett to fill Justice Ginsberg's seat on the Supreme Court. Judge Barrett is a dedicated Christian public servant -- a solid constitutionalist, who will steadfastly serve our nation. The Democrats are already attacking her faith - just think of what they're capable of doing to our religious freedom. We must support President Trump and the Republican Senate Majority and confirm Judge Barrett now.Read Hagerty's full statement on Judge Barrett's nomination [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-t/) **Looking To November** We are so proud of all of the work Team Hagerty has done to get us this far, but the race isn't over yet! We have another election to win in November. This time, it's not just sending Bill to the United States Senate, we must reelect President Donald Trump for four more years and expand our Republican supermajority in Tennessee so we can continue to stand up to the radical liberals who want to make America a socialist country. **Are You Registered To Vote?** Early voting begins in only 15 days! Make sure you're registered to vote and are ready to support President Trump and Team Hagerty in the election this November. You can register and find out more information on your polling location [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-i/)
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-d/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-h/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-k/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[Winchester Herald-Chronicle:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-u/) Trump supporters fill Tims Ford Lake for boat parade****[The Daily Times:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-o/) Senate candidate Bill Hagerty campaigns in Blount County****[WATE:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-b/) US Senate candidate Hagerty visiting Maryville on Tuesday****[WJHL:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-m/) Hagerty touts trade, foreign policy and economic development experience in Johnson City stop**
## **What They're Saying...**
> _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-c/) _" TN's Bill Hagerty is my friend & has been a champion for President Donald Trump's AMERICA FIRST agenda from Day One. Bill will fight for Conservative values, stand up for Life, Protect 2A Rights & create American jobs. TN & America need Bill Hagerty in the Senate!" _
> [-Vice President Mike Pence](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-q/) _" I fully support Bill Hagerty for the #TNSen, because I need a true Tennessee conservative to stand with me to protect our shared values. Bill is a true conservative, & he will always fight for you. Send him to the Senate to work with me & President Donald Trump." _
> [-Senator Marsha Blackburn](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-a/) _" Tennessee - send Bill Hagerty to the Senate. He supported President Donald Trump in 2016 & has worked closely with him since. Bill is the ONLY Trump conservative in the #TNSen race. He has my total support." _
> [-Fox News' Sean Hannity](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-f/) _" Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families."_
> [-Lara Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-z/) _" Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man."_
> [-Donald Trump Jr.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-v/)_" Ideologically, Bill is an unapologetic and a very proud conservative, and what I mean by that is he's for free markets, he is for freedom, not free stuff, and he respects the dignity and the liberty of each individual, and I know that's what makes him a conservative."_
> [-Kellyanne Conway](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-e/) _" Bill has been a good friend, he was a great ambassador to the US in Tokyo and he is going to be a fantastic senator. If there is one word I would use to describe Bill it's fearless. Bill helped solidify and strengthen our relationship with Japan which is absolutely essential to us standing up to China. Believe me, I can tell you that Beijing noticed the minute Bill got on the ground."_
> [-Sen. Tom Cotton](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-s/) _" Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!"_
> [-KT McFarland](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-g/) _" We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud."_
> [-Marilyn Musgrave](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-w/) _" We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revival. That's why we need Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Larry Kudlow](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-yd/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-yh/) _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-yk/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-yu/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-jl/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-jr/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-jy/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-jj/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xalhjy-fuutjhhtj-jt/)
---|---|---|---|---
Team Hagerty
P.O. Box 150748
Nashville, TN 37215

[ Forward ](https://hfs.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-fuutjhhtj-76178D70-xalhjy-l-jk)

body:
Presidential Debate Night | | | |
---
| [ ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=fb098b628a&e=3f151f8b74)

| | | [CHIP IN](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=c985d0ab81&e=3f151f8b74 "CHIP IN")
---
| Friend, That debate was more of a mess than our living rooms after a day of working from home and homeschooling. That's why we need moms in office and as the next Vice President.

Instead of a vicious fight, we wanted to hear about a plan for our country's economic recovery and we wanted to hear about the answers millions of working parents at home are waiting to hear.

All the things that were left unsaid matter to us and to our children. This is why we are advocating for the kind of policies that will lead us out of one of the worst economic downturns in American history.

But, we are falling short. A new Republican political action committee launched on Monday with a seven-figure national TV and digital ad campaign to bolster Trump’s support with moms.

Please help us stand up to this so that we can continue our fight to elect the kind of leaders who will truly stand up for single moms like me. Single moms who paid more taxes this year than Donald Trump.

We don't have seven-figure donors, but we have thousands of supporters like you who believe in our mission, and to us, every hard-earned dollar matters.

[Chip in ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=bbc2fd2c68&e=3f151f8b74)what you can today and help us get across the finish line tomorrow.

Thank you for all that you do!

Simona Grace
Founder, Moms in Office

If Biden wins, he's going to be a rubber stamp for the worst ideas **Nancy Pelosi, AOC, Chuck Schumer,** and**Bernie Sanders **have in store! And **second** , while you're watching tonight, remember that **you can do MORE than just scream at your TV! ** [Support Fitz for Congress - $10](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xqgc-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Support Fitz for Congress - $25](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xqgc-ahkdjtlkr-j/) There's going to be a LOT left unsaid tonight on both sides. But you and I both know tha**t socialism**, the **Green New Deal** , **universal healthcare** and much, much worse are all headed our way if the Democrats win up and down the ballot. **I hope I can count on you to help me fight back. **Enjoy the fireworks.Team Fitzgerald

name: Corky's iPhone
subject: Defeating the Dems in November
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
We can’t afford 6 more years of Jeanne Shaheen’s failed leadership! Read more >>
Peter, I know I don’t need to tell you again what’s at stake for the election in November. We’re only a few weeks away, and I need everyone to step up their game if we’re going to beat D.C. Jeanne Shaheen and flip this Senate seat RED! We simply can’t afford another six years of failed leadership in the Granite State. Will you help by chipping what you can right now? Even contributing just $10 or $20 at this point may mean the difference between winning and losing. You can make a secure donation by clicking this link: **[https://secure.winred.com/messner-for-senate/e-donor-eoq-4-093020](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b882050e8440ecab/bd2039b0f8372c2ac3d6b838967d376c/33153)** Top Democratic Senators have already threatened to block President Trump’s nominee to the Supreme Court, and we can’t let that happen. We are only hours away from our last end-of-quarter goal before the election. Please help me send a message to Senator Shaheen and her far-left friends that Americans are sick of their radical agenda! Thank you so much for your help,
Corky Messner Sent from my iPhone id:2020-09-23-14:08:38:020t PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE

name: Team Kennedy
subject: We haven’t reached every voter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
In just 34 days, the votes will be counted and we’ll know if Texas’ 17th District will be led by Rick and his commonsense, people-first vision, or by power-hungry Pete Sessions.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19744930/254287166/338717222?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200930EOQ5_TK_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzRlZjE5Zi0yZDAzLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1zEaLz6WUhYWZeBBPRtf4u0t0bRJGdiyLjAP8qJNPz8=)

In just 34 days, the votes will be counted and we’ll know if Texas’ 17th District will be represented by Rick and his commonsense, people-first vision, or by power-hungry Pete Sessions. But we still haven’t reached every voter in the district. They need to know that it’s in their best interest to reject Pete Sessions on Election Day. We can reach these voters easily, but first we need the resources to run a comprehensive online outreach program. That’s why we are asking for your help today. **We're just hours away from the midnight deadline of our end-of-quarter fundraising drive, and we still have $2,842 left to raise.[_But if each one of our grassroots donors steps up, clicks here, and chips in $10 or $15 we’ll hit our goal easily._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19744931/254287167/338717222?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200930EOQ5_TK_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzRlZjE5Zi0yZDAzLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1zEaLz6WUhYWZeBBPRtf4u0t0bRJGdiyLjAP8qJNPz8=)** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | | **[Donate $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19744932/254287168/-1714023214?express_lane=true&amount=10&fl_email_fr_20200930EOQ5_TK_all_xx_abx10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzRlZjE5Zi0yZDAzLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1zEaLz6WUhYWZeBBPRtf4u0t0bRJGdiyLjAP8qJNPz8=)**

name: Melissa Hortman
subject: Trump visiting (again!)
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/6m33KFF_meyvxDLrWrjATX3WgHlb05qkmzTAQAAYYUg=/e2qKhp5utm11qkCRgSLGkBzvvZaXlmdy7opb9EFZ-3E=?refcode=EOM3)
| | Friend, Your support over the last two years has meant the world to me. From passing gun violence prevention off of the House floor to enacting the most comprehensive wage theft prevention law in the country, we've accomplished a lot together. There is still so much for us to do. Unfortunately, **Republicans in the Minnesota Senate blocked progress on much of what he hoped to get done to build a better, more equitable future for all Minnesotans.** Trump is visiting Minnesota again today, the second time in just two weeks. Every time he visits he brings more money, more attention, and a harder push to turn Minnesota red. Will you help us by making an investment in our campaign today? **We have just over a month until election day.** [**Make a contribution**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6m33KFF_meyvxDLrWrjATX3WgHlb05qkmzTAQAAYYUg=/e2qKhp5utm11qkCRgSLGkBzvvZaXlmdy7opb9EFZ-3E=?refcode=EOM3) Minnesotans are already voting, Trump is rushing an appointment to the Supreme Court, and COVID-19 is still raging across the country. The stakes have never been higher. That's why we need to send Minnesota Republicans a strong message at the polls this November: we need to grow our House DFL Majority, and that's exactly what we plan to do. But we need your help. Thank you for being on our team, **Melissa Hortman** Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6m33KFF_meyvxDLrWrjATX3WgHlb05qkmzTAQAAYYUg=/e2qKhp5utm11qkCRgSLGkBzvvZaXlmdy7opb9EFZ-3E=?refcode=EOM3)
---

name: Belinda Biafore
subject: tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

Friend,

Tonight is the most important fundraising deadline in our lifetimes. This is our last big chance to fill the war chest as we march towards November 3 rd to elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. Donald Trump and his corrupt GOP loyalists need to go, or else our country is going to face a very dark next four years.
I’m asking you to come up with whatever you can, and help us meet our goal by midnight. We have another $4,060 to go, and there has never been so much urgency. We need to flip every seat possible, up and down the ticket. We need to elect Democrats, sanity, and decency back into leadership.
Will you donate right now, please, and help us Get Out The Vote? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

name: Mary Mancini
subject: Trump needs to be stopped
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
Last night was horrifying. The President of the United States was asked point blank to denounce white supremacists and his response was to tell the hate group Proud Boys to ‘stand back and stand by.’ Our president publicly refused to denounce white supremacy and now white supremacist groups are celebrating Trump's answers and using them for recruitment.
Midnight tonight is the last meaningful fundraising deadline to raise money to elect Joe Biden and every other Democrat we can. We have a month to get every Tennessean who opposes our Corrupter-in-Cheat, red or blue, ready to vote so we can take back this country. Right now, I’m asking you to dig deep and donate whatever you can. This is beyond Democrats vs Republicans. We are fighting for humanity and truth – decency and reason. Trump needs to be stopped before he destroys this nation beyond repair.
The TNDP has to raise another $7,340 to cover costs for GOTV efforts through the election. Will you please make a donation right now if you can? The country needs your help! [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

**Donate now****to help him meet his last FEC quarter goal before the election -- our deadline is tonight at midnight!** | **[Donate Now ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19749314/254306700/1226323243?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.30_b1_j_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGJlMjFmNi0zNzAzLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=do7iKdrJWRLJujM2DVWGwdNxo2UjvYv8tNqfg93XDY8=)**
---
Friend, the _Houston Chronicle_ is right: Sri is the _clear choice_ for voters in our district. Unlike our opponent and his shady record, **Sri will put working families first and fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, expand access to affordable health care, and ensure that our economy works for everyone.**

But we’re up against millions of dollars in outside spending and an opponent who’s spent the last several weeks more focused on high-end fundraisers than answering the public.

Sri may be the clear choice for voters -- _but special interests are not giving up on our opponent._

**With just a few hours to go before our final FEC quarterly deadline, we need you to do everything you can to make sure we hit our goal. Can we count on you to chip in?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [Contribute $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19749315/254306701/1226323243?express_lane=true&refcode=em_fr_2020.09.30_b1_j_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGJlMjFmNi0zNzAzLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=do7iKdrJWRLJujM2DVWGwdNxo2UjvYv8tNqfg93XDY8=)

name: Team Northam
subject: Help keep this champion for everyday Virginians in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
|
---

---

---
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/DzLFghDj5Dv5M5sRFU3RQW5uH9bwomEoffDXskGhJb8=/LLnjSqXCVN6K1AgneK2VlBxHTbTv9Gmv39GLLfaP8T8=) _Here at The Way Ahead PAC, we recognize that our world is going through a very uncertain and difficult time right now --a time when it's hard to think of anything but the well-being of our own family and friends. Please only make a donation if you can afford to do so._
---
Friend It's more important than ever to support and elect leaders at all levels of government who will fight on behalf of Virginia's families. That's why we are asking you today to stand with Democratic Congresswoman Elaine Luria, who is defending a toss-up seat in one of the most competitive races in the entire nation. As a 20-year Navy veteran, Elaine was one of the first women to serve the entirety of her career on combatant ships and led a combat-ready unit of 400+ sailors as a Commander. In 2018, she was part of a historic wave of first-time candidates who flipped red-to-blue seats -- and now she's hard at work in Washington to protect our healthcare, get our veterans the benefits they deserve, and hold this administration accountable to the American people. [Elaine flipped VA-02 by just 2.3 points in 2018 -- will you chip in to her campaign before her critical end-of-quarter deadline hits at midnight tonight to help keep her in Congress?](https://act.myngp.com/el/DzLFghDj5Dv5M5sRFU3RQW5uH9bwomEoffDXskGhJb8=/59Gyti8myIrSwfN3bYdmu5ydHzO9pT1jlK0wic_dmxU=) Elaine is a top target for national Republicans. Now that a recent poll shows her TIED with former GOP Congressman Scott Taylor, outside groups will be working even harder to unseat her. We need true public servants like Elaine in Congress more than ever before. She's counting on supporters like you to help her reach this crucial benchmark for her campaign. Thank you, **Team Northam**

name: Greg Stanton
subject: The choice in November is clear--Joe Biden is the leader we need
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
**[We all know what is at stake this November. That's why I'm calling on you to help me elect Joe Biden.](https://act.myngp.com/el/WzBdRmZNdofs6RgexBI8gLBABeKuJHKGr9mZxNI5b6E=/VUx3SVuU_MqMw1esxzmedx_jZuwju5bXZNbkx3g2Fog=?refcode=X_092820_BidenTandem_A)**

Contributions made using this form will be split between Greg Stanton for Congress and Joe Biden for President.

I know that Joe Biden will deliver meaningful results for Arizona families by improving and expanding access to health care, creating jobs, and putting America back where it belongs as a global leader - especially when it comes to addressing climate change.

Joe Biden is not only the best candidate to take back the White House, but he is the best choice to make sure that we have a legislative majority who will fight for working families.

**[Will you chip in to join me in supporting Joe Biden's campaign to return respected, competent leadership to America?](https://act.myngp.com/el/WzBdRmZNdofs6RgexBI8gLBABeKuJHKGr9mZxNI5b6E=/VUx3SVuU_MqMw1esxzmedx_jZuwju5bXZNbkx3g2Fog=?refcode=X_092820_BidenTandem_A)**

September is almost over, friend!

It's the last day of the month, and our critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is TONIGHT.

**_We can't miss our $200,000 goal, and we're not there yet. There is no time to lose._**

**I need your help right now for this final end-of-quarter push, friend.** **[Can you chip in $20 to make sure this is our biggest fundraising month EVER?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2ed8/5b2c1286/3ba4151e/25f2674b/487480973/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_30_j_am_eoq?refcode=em_2020_09_30_j_am_eoq&amount=20")**

September has been a great month for this campaign.

I am surging in the polls against David Perdue -- _two new polls came out YESTERDAY with me in the lead!_ Mitch McConnell is in serious jeopardy of losing his majority.

That's why Mitch and his buddies are shoveling close to **_$40 MILLION_** into Georgia.

**_And President Obama just endorsed me!_**

I am so grateful for the support from everyone on this amazing team. This momentum is thanks to supporters like YOU.
**[Now, I'm asking you to go the extra mile and chip in $20 or more RIGHT NOW to help us crush our end-of-quarter goal before tonight's deadline.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2ed8/5b2c1286/3ba4151e/25f2674b/487480973/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_30_j_am_eoq?refcode=em_2020_09_30_j_am_eoq&amount=20")**

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: The choice could not be more clear
body:
Tonight, we saw two stark visions for the future of America...
Peter,Tonight, we saw two stark visions for the future of America, and the choice could not be more clear. After months of dodging interviews and press conferences, Joe Biden finally presented his agenda to the American people - and it's just as radical as we imagined. He's been in government for nearly 50 years and has done nothing but negotiate bad trade deals, raise taxes and make empty promises. Now he is the Democratic Party's choice to champion their socialist agenda - including implementing the Green New Deal, socialized medicine, defunding the police and packing the Supreme Court with activist judges. We must re-elect President Donald Trump for four more years. He's kept his promises - cutting taxes, eliminating regulations, growing an economy, nominating constitutionalist judges and justices, moving our embassy in Israel to Jerusalem, eliminating ISIS and ALWAYS putting America first. [**Sign to congratulate President Trump on winning tonight 's debate!**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xmdlud-fuutjhhtj-r/)President Trump was the clear winner of tonight's debate, and Americans are ready to re-elect him for four more years - the future of our democracy depends on it. Best,Bill Hagerty
Candidate for U.S. Senate (R-TN) | [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xmdlud-fuutjhhtj-y/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xmdlud-fuutjhhtj-j/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xmdlud-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xmdlud-fuutjhhtj-i/)

name: Team Carney
subject: Make a plan to vote today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/IErMQja764mlMggEU1dsPQ==/f6tjR8IQ1Yva1nPL2bAVrA==?midqs=3IEqMLq0Oib3LAq6BWSGtQ==)
---

**FROM THE TEAM**

After last night's debate, it's never been more clear. **We need Joe Biden in the White House** to help us navigate the COVID-19 crisis, protect health care for millions of Americans, confront climate change, and build our economy back, better.

President Trump and his supporters want to make it harder for you to exercise your fundamental right to vote. Just this week, the Delaware Chancery Court [denied the Delaware GOP's effort](https://act.myngp.com/el/IErMQja764mlMggEU1dsPQ==/ekgdXMEa1m0r2vq-Qe0ceQ==) to throw out Delawareans' mail-in ballots.

**They 're trying to prevent you from voting - but that's not possible. It's in your control**. Return a mail-in ballot now. Or vote in person on Election Day. Make a plan to have your voice heard in this election. **REMINDER: **The deadline to register to vote in the General Election is October 10.

_**Let 's bring decency back to the White House.**_ Do you have a plan to vote? Visit [ivote.de.gov ](https://act.myngp.com/el/IErMQja764mlMggEU1dsPQ==/3QCoQPeP7a7MJvXdTKQbSA==)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/IErMQja764mlMggEU1dsPQ==/k4wr7MxdE0oBz6bjTrK8-Q==?v=Lra4IApbuZo&t=2s)

Thanks for your continued support,

Team Carney

name: KS-SEN Poll Alert
subject: Barbara just pulled ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bollier for Kansas
body:
The momentum is real, but we can’t afford to take anything for granted with the stakes this high. So we’re raising our goal: will you pitch in right now to help us hit $150,000 before the midnight deadline? Every donation before midnight will be AUTOMATICALLY MATCHED! |
---
| | **KANSAS SENATE POLL**
**Barbara Bollier: 45%**
**Roger Marshall: 43%** Team, A brand new Senate poll released today shows that Dr. Barbara Bollier has pulled ahead of her GOP opponent Roger Marshall -- she’s now up by **TWO POINTS** in the Kansas Senate race! This is incredible news -- and if that weren’t enough, **this grassroots team just blew past our $100,000 end-of-quarter fundraising goal!** The momentum is real, team, but we can’t afford to take anything for granted with the stakes this high. So we’re raising our goal: ****[Will you pitch in $5 right now to help us hit $150,000 before the midnight deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19753775/254323963/-317648503?refcode=em200930am-i&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2U2YzkyMy00NDAzLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5HHJAOS_bsiaSAzspSxdev5t5SICFChYDk5epMj_7f4=)**** We know we can win this race and flip Kansas’ Senate seat if we keep standing together. name: Matt Gaze
subject: You need to see this, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friend,

We’re down to the wire.

Tonight, this campaign will face its last FEC quarter deadline, which means it’s also our last chance of this election to prove our grassroots fundraising prowess to our opponents.

Not only has the power of our campaign piqued the interests of top conservative super PACs, but as statewide polls show Texas on the verge of flipping blue, national groups at the presidential level are starting to take notice, too.

So we need to make sure that we’re ready to file the strongest fundraising report of this election.

If we signal any vulnerability in these numbers -- we can expect our district to be flooded with even MORE spending by outside groups backing our opponent. Please donate now to help us close our $18,000 gap >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.30_b2_mg_all&amount=25

Winning this election and sending Sri to Congress means we can make progress on the issues that matter -- like finally expanding access to affordable health care and stopping DC interests from buying politicians who want to gut Social Security and Medicare.

But to get there, we need you. We’re just hours away from our MIDNIGHT FEC fundraising deadline, and we need your help to reach our ambitious goal.

Can we count on you to help us get there? >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.30_b2_mg_all&amount=25

Thanks,
Matt

Can you make it weekly?

Friend -- we’re just 5 weeks away from Election Day, and every dollar that comes through the door is immediately going back out to help us flip this seat. Your grassroots donations have put us on the path to victory, but now we need you to double down.

Can you commit to a $5 or more weekly donation between now and November 3rd? Even $5 goes a long way!

MAKE IT WEEKLY ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.30_b2_mg_all&amount=5&recurring=1

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.30_b2_mg_all&amount=25

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/

Paid for by Sri for Congress

SRI FOR CONGRESS
P.O. BOX 898
SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]

If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/1533152f-2f03-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc/6eb2b161-4403-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWIyYjE2MS00NDAzLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xgtpTQb46Fv-PJxMXUBfaJyL8N6d-voA_nmBLyM3ADA=&id=117373579 .

| A message from Scott.
---
| The election is only 35 days away, and today is the final day of the quarter: September-end marks our most important fundraising deadline of the campaign.
Right now, we are just $14,741 dollars short of setting a record for money raised in a quarter by a Republican in this district.
You have been our campaign's foundation, and I can't tell you how much I appreciate your continued, generous support. Will you help us break the record, and more importantly, fight to win this seat from the radical Left?

Right now, we are just $14,741 dollars short of setting a record for money raised in a quarter by a Republican in this district. You have been our campaign's foundation, and I can't tell you how much I appreciate your continued, generous support. Will you help us break the record, and more importantly, fight to win this seat from the radical Left? | | | == | Upcoming Events | | | ---|--- | TONIGHT Meet + Greet at Campaign HQ! Our new batch of yard signs just arrived - we invite you to join us at our Campaign Headquarters for a rolling yard sign pickup! Wednesday, September 30th 4:00 - 8:00 PM TONIGHT Taylor for Congress 2020 Headquarters 2953 Virginia Beach Blvd. STE 107-108 Virginia Beach VA 23452 If you have extra time, please volunteer with us from the office. body:
This is your best opportunity yet to help elect MJ.

**Remember, this is our _final_ end-of-quarter deadline before the general election.** When the next finance reports are released, everyone from our opponents to the press will be scouring them to determine just how strong our campaign is.

We know we have the strength to beat Sen. Cornyn and flip Texas -- but we have to make sure everyone else knows it too! And with the double match now in effect, this is your best opportunity yet to pitch in to help elect MJ.

**Will you make a DOUBLE MATCHED donation to help us reach our end-of-quarter goal before tonight 's midnight deadline so we can FLIP THE SENATE this November?**

name: True the Vote
subject: It's Not Too Late to Serve in the Election - and You're Needed!
body:
| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=257A537A20A2487)
---
| | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cCUzQSUyRiUyRnd3dy50cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmc=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=257A537A20A2488)
---
| | Hi Friend,
We've had overwhelming feedback from patriots around the country who've called their counties to volunteer for duty this election cycle, ranging from reports of successful placements to dead ends and no followup. Don't give up - keep pressing on!

If you haven't heard from your county, the next stop is Call Your Party!
---
| |
---
| | You can find party information on our [**In Your State page**](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZyZXNvdXJjZXMlMkYlMjNtYXA=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=257A537A20A2489).
---
| |
---
| | Ask to be connected with whoever is overseeing the**Ballot Security effort.
** Let them know you are WILLING TO SERVE!

---
| |
---
| | If you don't hear back from them, contact them again tomorrow. They are likely being pulled in 1,000 different directions, so be persistent!
---
| |
---
| | Once you get your assignment, let us hear from you so we can stay connected with late-breaking news and other forms of support! You can let us know how you are serving by clicking below:
---
| | [ HOW ARE YOU SERVING? ](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5hY3RpdmVob3N0ZWQuY29tJTJGZiUyRjMy&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=257A537A20A2490)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Finally, remember that every state's statutes are different. Every party's ballot security plans are different. **Just call and get the process started.** Where you'll serve depends on need, timing, requirements, statues, and a host of other considerations. You might be needed as an election worker, a poll watcher, or to serve on a signature review board. There are LOTS of ways you can be involved. **Contact them today - time is of the essence!

WE ARE ALL IN THIS TOGETHER - PLEASE GET INVOLVED TO HELP SUPPORT SAFE, SECURE ELECTIONS!

Onward -
The True the Vote Team**
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Join the conversation on social:
---
| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cCUzQSUyRiUyRnd3dy5mYWNlYm9vay5jb20lMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZQ==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=257A537A20A2491) | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cudHdpdHRlci5jb20lMkZUcnVlVGhlVm90ZSUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=257A537A20A2492) | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20lMkZUcnVlVGhlVm90ZQ==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=257A537A20A2493)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Hi Friend, We've had overwhelming feedback from patriots around the country who've called their counties to volunteer for duty this election cycle, ranging from reports of successful placements to dead ends and no followup. Don't give up - keep pressing on! If you haven't heard from your county, the next stop is Call Your Party! | | | | You can find party information on our . | | | | Ask to be connected with whoever is overseeing theBallot Security effort. Let them know you are WILLING TO SERVE! | | | | If you don't hear back from them, contact them again tomorrow. They are likely being pulled in 1,000 different directions, so be persistent! | | | | Once you get your assignment, let us hear from you so we can stay connected with late-breaking news and other forms of support! You can let us know how you are serving by clicking below: | | | | | | | Finally, remember that every state's statutes are different. Every party's ballot security plans are different. Just call and get the process started. Where you'll serve depends on need, timing, requirements, statues, and a host of other considerations. You might be needed as an election worker, a poll watcher, or to serve on a signature review board. There are LOTS of ways you can be involved. Contact them today - time is of the essence! WE ARE ALL IN THIS TOGETHER - PLEASE GET INVOLVED TO HELP SUPPORT SAFE, SECURE ELECTIONS! Onward - The True the Vote Team | | | | | Join the conversation on social: | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | Copyright © 2020 True the Vote, All rights reserved | | True The Vote, PO Box 3109 #19128, Houston, TX 77253-3109, United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: Tonight's deadline
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/86ae2f064eca/tonights-deadline?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | **The last major FEC deadline of the election cycle is tonight.** This is the ultimate financial hurdle for the campaign, so it is extremely important that we not just meet our goal, but blow past it.

We need to make sure that every voter in IL-16 hears our message and recognizes that better representation is possible. Right now, we have a Congressman who consistently votes against women, the LGBTQ+ community, farmers, and folks with pre-existing conditions. He has earned himself a reputation of absenteeism, having not held an open town hall in years.

**We can do better.** I am running on a people-based platform that emphasizes universal healthcare, campaign finance reform, access to broadband, and rebuilding our crumbling infrastructure. My opponent answers to his corporate donors, while I answer to the people of IL-16.

_[Click here to chip in and help us reach our goal and unseat the last remaining Republican Congressman from northern Illinois.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=aa33e2cc25&e=140a9b81e7)_

**So far, we have had an amazing quarter.** We have received so many endorsements, from leaders like Gloria Steinem and Senator Tammy Duckworth to groundbreaking organizations like NARAL and Sierra Club. Our outdoor, socially-distanced Park Tour has had wildly successful turnout. And to top it all off, I just trounced my opponent in our first (and likely only) debate.

**Let’s finish September with that same energy.**

In a grassroots campaign like this, every single dollar counts. We are so very close to reaching this goal and I know that we can do it. [_**Can I count on you to donate whatever you can by midnight tonight, so that we can finish an already incredible quarter off strong?**_](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=320a4df53e&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Unemployment Notice
body:
We’ve gotten so far together and now we’re 34 days away from Election Day and neck-and-neck with Lois Frankel!
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395250-931109-5218126-3dfc5f7b50-f74c50e080)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395250-931109-5218126-3dfc5f7b50-f74c50e080) This is it.

Your support is GREATLY appreciated.

We’ve gotten so far together and now we’re **34 days away from Election Day and neck-and-neck with Lois Frankel!**

The most critical fundraising quarter of the campaign ends tonight.

If you’ve been holding back and you can spare to give ANY amount more, [**please do it now**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395250-931109-5218126-3dfc5f7b50-f74c50e080).

[**By midnight TONIGHT, we need to raise $124,000. Will you donate?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395250-931109-5218126-3dfc5f7b50-f74c50e080)

My opponent has been BLANKETING the local TV stations with the same ad, over and over and over.

In the ad, Frankel starts by saying, “these are tough times, and **Donald Trump is only making it worse . . .IT’S CRAZY.** ”

She goes on to express her support for small businesses and our economy . . . **but I’m calling B.S.**

Up to THIS day, Frankel is calling for MORE regulation of small business owners, adding to their costs and burden.

**WHILE THEY ARE ALREADY FIGHTING FOR THEIR LIVES!!!**

[**Help me put Lois Frankel on the unemployment line by winning this race.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395250-931109-5218126-3dfc5f7b50-f74c50e080)

[**Donate $10 today, and let’s win this!**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395250-931109-5218126-3dfc5f7b50-f74c50e080)

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

With only weeks until November 3rd, Virginia is still a critical battleground in the fight to win the White House, take back Congress and save the Supreme Court.**

name: Matt, Sarah, Me
subject: Fwd: Update on our fundraising numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mowers for Congress |
body:
Here’s where we’re at as of now. | |
---
Friend,

I just got an email from my fundraising team about our big end of quarter push...

We started strong, but we’re still $2,349 short of hitting our goal.

We broke a GOP quarterly fundraising record for New Hampshire earlier this year. Will you chip in before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so we can reach our goal and break another record?

disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Here’s where things stand in the race to represent Kentucky’s 6th District, just 34 days out:

|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19757402/254337110/-1729872895?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200930EOQ10_TH_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmYxM2NjOC00ZTAzLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19aoDajxC4SP1w0hHO-4E1AbDelLRNZ2vkPnmSvaD-c=)
| | Friends — Here’s where things stand in the race to represent Kentucky’s 6th District, just 34 days out: **The Good** : Thanks to donors like you, we were able to get biographical ads up on television and online a week before Andy Barr started advertising. **We were able to define the race and let voters know who Josh is** before the negative attacks came. **The Bad** : Our opponent has raised hundreds of thousands of dollars in corporate PAC contributions, and we need to keep up. He’s got all that money because special interest groups have paid him to have their backs — not the backs of regular Kentuckians — in Washington. **The Ugly** : Andy Barr’s using that corporate cash to launch misleading and false attacks on Josh, and he’s even lying about his own record. Why? Because he’s a cynical politician, willing to do whatever and say whatever to get re-elected. [_**Can we count on you to chip in before midnight tonight to help us reach our most important fundraising goal of the campaign?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19757403/254337111/-1729872895?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200930EOQ10_TH_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmYxM2NjOC00ZTAzLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19aoDajxC4SP1w0hHO-4E1AbDelLRNZ2vkPnmSvaD-c=) If you’ve been waiting to give, if you’ve wanted to chip in when it matters most — this is that moment. _**Now’s the time to give.**_ Folks like you have been the backbone of this campaign, chipping in $10 and $20 here and there because they believe in Josh and they believe that Kentuckians deserve good, honest representation in Washington. **We’re still a little bit short of our critical end-of-quarter goal.[_If you can chip in now, it will make all the difference as we enter the final month of the campaign._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19757404/254337112/-1729872895?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200930EOQ10_TH_all_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmYxM2NjOC00ZTAzLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19aoDajxC4SP1w0hHO-4E1AbDelLRNZ2vkPnmSvaD-c=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Here’s where things stand in the race to represent Kentucky’s 6th District, just 34 days out: | = | | Friends — Here’s where things stand in the race to represent Kentucky’s 6th District, just 34 days out: The Good : Thanks to donors like you, we were able to get biographical ads up on television and online a week before Andy Barr started advertising. We were able to define the race and let voters know who Josh is before the negative attacks came. The Bad : Our opponent has raised hundreds of thousands of dollars in corporate PAC contributions, and we need to keep up. He’s got all that money because special interest groups have paid him to have their backs — not the backs of regular Kentuckians — in Washington. The Ugly : Andy Barr’s using that corporate cash to launch misleading and false attacks on Josh, and he’s even lying about his own record. Why? Because he’s a cynical politician, willing to do whatever and say whatever to get re-elected. = If you’ve been waiting to give, if you’ve wanted to chip in when it matters most — this is that moment. Now’s the time to give. Folks like you have been the backbone of this campaign, chipping in $10 and $20 here and there because they believe in Josh and they believe that Kentuckians deserve good, honest representation in Washington. We’re still a little bit short of our critical end-of-quarter goal.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Team Hicks | | Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress Josh Hicks for Congress PO Box 1214 Lexington, KY 40588 United States Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Join Wesley Hunt For A Day Of Action!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Election Day just 5 weeks away, and Team Hunt is all-hands-on-deck working to energize voters throughout the 7th District and encourage them to support Wesley at the ballot box.

We hope you will join us this Saturday, October 3rd for our second **Day of Action**!

We need your help to share Wesley's message as he fights to protect Houston energy workers, increase access to quality health care, and ensure our law enforcement officers have the support they need to keep our communities safe.

We will be convening this Saturday at 10:00am at three locations:
1. Hunt Headquarters, 11511 Katy Freeway, Suite 105, 77079
2. 16000 Dillard Drive, Suite C, 77040
3. 3710 Bellafontaine Street, 77025

Please pick the location that is most convenient for you. We will be block walking, phone banking, and text banking to share Wesley's message to neighbors throughout the 7th District and we hope to see you there.

If you plan to attend, please RSVP to info@wesleyfortexas.com.

Please join us this Saturday at 10:00am and help us defeat Lizzie Fletcher!

Sincerely,
Team Hunt

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=b7e469a9fe3546bf82952e28a4d5379a&_e=4EFWdjeZ8JXIi-UjqCFMOmmTjUwwjabTN1BqmivcMu6PG5Mp7BsP3uCB7lvb1odlToBF9FVim_hPhbihHYhhc87-szSKumCHUwHpz3jQu2nFGNbV3HBBkqP8nQsJni_XSt4eKbBRG7N9N52ioI4Og22AUsmmliXJYHHWjVliylXSmsh2tq1OKoRbKtLoEKwx_mVcWcv_EPGXAAY2iMdfJZetkA36cr1zJH0i0PUIOA3jd0OISwsr_HGQLRL8VBxHs3_flSb02ZoOGMv_kjmBss3pW6dK-uW2kTznzIfDHb8%3D)****

body:
There's simply too much at stake now.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8168%2E868730%2EosKZy9) Friend, This is the last call. You know what's at stake. Governors are now all that is keeping the wolves from the door. You want progress? I'll fight for it -- but more importantly, we'll defend that progress. In this state, as long as I'm governor, health care will be protected for all citizens. The right to choose will always be safe here, and I will continue to fight to end the scourge of gun violence. But only if I'm reelected this year -- otherwise, we know what will happen next if my extremist, anti-science, right-wing opponent is elected. **That's why I'm asking for you to step up right now. We have a $75,000 end-of-month goal to hit by midnight, and we're just $8,645 short.[Ballots drop in about two weeks -- can you donate $5 or more right now so we leave it all on the field?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12059?t=4&akid=8168%2E868730%2EosKZy9)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12060?t=5&akid=8168%2E868730%2EosKZy9)

body:

Friend, We are just hours away from our end of the month fundraising deadline, and my team has informed me that we are only $5,000 short of our monthly goal - can I count on you to help us reach our goal? [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/g3JlH763VP2fYwnVyGI0uV3g/xmZFynxjTwMWQ5RT6B9HpA)
With just 34 days left until the critical election on November 3rd, we are in the final stretch, and the stakes couldn't be higher. My opponent, Nate McMurray, is fully on board with the radical socialist agenda of higher taxes, the green new deal, higher crime, and less freedom - and we cannot let him get the chance to enact it. Here in Western New York - we reject those radical policies, and we reject politicians who blatantly mock our values - and he takes any chance he gets to put down our way of life. Meanwhile, I'm proud to be an American, and I'm proud to represent our great region in Congress. Since being elected in June, I have been fighting for our small businesses, fighting for our farmers, and fighting to hold China accountable. And I'm going to keep doing that in my next term. My opponent has crazy ideas and radical policies - but I've got solutions, and I am implementing them. And I need you. Together, we will keep fighting for the America we know and love, and we are going to keep fighting for policies that make our nation stronger. Can I count on you to help us reach our goal? [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/g3JlH763VP2fYwnVyGI0uV3g/xmZFynxjTwMWQ5RT6B9HpA) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/g3JlH763VP2fYwnVyGI0uV3g/xmZFynxjTwMWQ5RT6B9HpA) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/g3JlH763VP2fYwnVyGI0uV3g/xmZFynxjTwMWQ5RT6B9HpA) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/g3JlH763VP2fYwnVyGI0uV3g/xmZFynxjTwMWQ5RT6B9HpA) We are in a battle for the future of our country, and it is going to take every one of us to stop Nancy, Nate, and Joe Biden - let's go win this! Sincerely,
Chris Jacobs

subject: Join Team Dani in Ottawa this Saturday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4692ba46cb89/join-team-dani-in-ottawa-this-saturday?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
With only 34 days to go before Election Day, we need your help to get our message out to the voters! **This Saturday, we'll be joining the LaSalle County Democratic Party for a day of action in Ottawa** to help get out the vote for Democrats up and down the ballot.

We'll be there along with several other Democratic candidates in key races. You won't want to miss this chance to help turn LaSalle County blue! The event will kick off at 11 am at Jordan Block, right across the street from JJ's Pub on East Main in Ottawa. The event will be outdoors, and masks are required. Learn more [here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=0f989d460c&e=140a9b81e7)!

Come out to meet Democratic candidates, pick up yard signs, and help us distribute literature via no-contact lit drops! **Volunteers will be entered to win prizes and snacks will be provided!**

Can't make it to Ottawa this Saturday? That's okay! You can also help us get the word out by signing up to drop lit in your neighborhood or to make calls from the comfort of your own home. [Click here to sign up!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=b9bee73220&e=140a9b81e7)

We hope to see you on Saturday!
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: A Healthcare Plan for All Americans
body:
If there’s one thing Americans need to know about the healthcare plan President Trump unveiled last week, it’s this: The president is delivering... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fe49db8da8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **A Healthcare Plan for All Americans**

“If there’s one thing Americans need to know about the healthcare plan President Trump unveiled last week, it’s this: The president is delivering more choice, lower costs, and better care for every American, whatever their healthcare needs or however their healthcare is paid for,” Health & Human Services Secretary Alex Azar writes in _Townhall_.

“The previous administration’s attempt to fix our healthcare system, the Affordable Care Act (ACA), focused primarily on a tiny slice of American healthcare: the individual insurance market. President Trump’s plan goes much further.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2c22ca6ea4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said Tuesday that President Trump’s critics were ‘dead wrong’ in predicting that the Trump administration’s attempts to bring peace to the Middle East would fail—after a series of landmark U.S.-brokered deals were signed earlier this month,” Ben Evansky and Adam Shaw report for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9f49d559e4&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “A judge must apply the law as written. Judges are not policymakers, and they must be resolute in setting aside any policy views they might hold,” Judge Amy Coney Barrett, President Trump’s nominee for the Supreme Court, said on Saturday. “I would assume this role to serve you,” she told the American people. Read more from the [White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3ac143944d&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Trump is bringing some attention to the connections between this summer’s riots, the 63 percent of young Americans who believe America is racist, and the disaster that is civics and history instruction in U.S. public schools. He recently announced a federal commission to counter the saturation of anti-American ideology in American education institutions,” Joy Pullman writes in [_The Federalist_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=15eaf9501b&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bd160e0a91&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1d2d310360&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=e257a0305e)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Surge in Illegal Immigrants Smuggled into U.S. Packed in Commercial Tractor-Trailers
body:
As COVID-19 ravages Latin America—especially Mexico—a record number of illegal immigrants are being smuggled into the United States through the southern border in commercial tractor-trailers.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | September 30, 2020
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51590&L=20649&F=H&)
---
# [Surge in Illegal Immigrants Smuggled into U.S. Packed in Commercial Tractor-Trailers](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51590&L=20649&F=H&)
As COVID-19 ravages Latin America—especially Mexico—a record number of illegal immigrants are being smuggled into the United States through the southern border in commercial tractor-trailers. Human smugglers cram the migrants, mostly from Central America, in large trailers with no ventilation, water or food for days, according to the U.S. Border Patrol. “The tractor-trailer is the final trap of their 1,600 mile treacherous journey from Central America to the United States,” the agency writes in a statement issued this month. “Migrants are exposed to these dangers by smugglers who know the life-threatening journey will be in vain given increased border enforcement and partnerships with affected governments.”
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51590&L=20649&F=H&)
|
---
| |
---
### [Judicial Watch Opposes State/Justice Department Request to End Remaining Discovery in Clinton Email/Benghazi Lawsuit ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51590&L=20635&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctb3Bwb3Nlcy1zdGF0ZS1kb2otcmVxdWVzdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMDkzMDE2MjY0Nw==) Judicial Watch Judicial Watch argues in its opposition that the State Department is wrong to try to expand an August 2020 appellate court ruling blocking Clinton’s deposition. The ruling did not bar the deposition of Mills or any other witness. Judicial Watch intends to seek further review of the ruling. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51590&L=20635&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctb3Bwb3Nlcy1zdGF0ZS1kb2otcmVxdWVzdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMDkzMDE2MjY0Nw==)
---
### [Judicial Watch Statement on Supreme Court Nominee Judge Amy Coney Barrett ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51590&L=20634&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvc2NvdHVzLXBpY2stYmFycmV0dC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMDkzMDE2MjY0Nw==) Judicial Watch What a brave, wonderful Supreme Court pick by President Trump! President Trump has once again stood up for the U.S. Constitution with his nomination of Judge Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court. Judge Barrett has a demonstrated record of applying the rule of law rather than legislating from the bench. clean_body: As COVID-19 ravages Latin America—especially Mexico—a record number of illegal immigrants are being smuggled into the United States through the southern border in commercial tractor-trailers. | | | Because no one is above the law! | September 30, 2020 ---|---|--- | | As COVID-19 ravages Latin America—especially Mexico—a record number of illegal immigrants are being smuggled into the United States through the southern border in commercial tractor-trailers. Human smugglers cram the migrants, mostly from Central America, in large trailers with no ventilation, water or food for days, according to the U.S. Border Patrol. “The tractor-trailer is the final trap of their 1,600 mile treacherous journey from Central America to the United States,” the agency writes in a statement issued this month. “Migrants are exposed to these dangers by smugglers who know the life-threatening journey will be in vain given increased border enforcement and partnerships with affected governments.” | | | == Judicial Watch Judicial Watch argues in its opposition that the State Department is wrong to try to expand an August 2020 appellate court ruling blocking Clinton’s deposition. The ruling did not bar the deposition of Mills or any other witness. Judicial Watch intends to seek further review of the ruling. == == Judicial Watch What a brave, wonderful Supreme Court pick by President Trump! President Trump has once again stood up for the U.S. Constitution with his nomination of Judge Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court. Judge Barrett has a demonstrated record of applying the rule of law rather than legislating from the bench. == = The Daily Caller The passing of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg has brought leftists to a full political tantrum. Facts, timing and the Constitution make it an increasingly likely prospect that President Trump will successfully install a third Supreme Court Justice in his first term. That drives liberals over the edge. clean_body: Friends, Our FINAL end-of-quarter fundraising deadline before November 3rd is at MIDNIGHT TONIGHT! And I still need help from you and other Arizona patriots to meet our goal. If we fall short in this – the most crucial fundraising deadline of the entire campaign cycle – we’ll struggle to get our pro-Trump, pro-borders, pro-FREEDOM, “Arizona First” message out to the people, so please help before it’s too late! Tom O’Halleran has raised over $2 MILLION for this race, and half of it is from PACs and other swampy special interests. But I’ve got President Trump on my side, and as long as I have you and flag-waving patriots like you across Arizona, we will close the fundraising gap at midnight tonight and then WIN on November 3rd! Take a stand against the tax-raising, border-destroying, gun-banning, police-defunding, COURT-PACKING Radical Left, friend! For Arizona! Tiffany Shedd Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee

name: Jason Yates
subject: Did you watch last night?
body:
Peter,
Every Christian needs to pay attention to the two topics that started and ended last night’s Presidential debate.
The first question right out of the gate was about the brewing Supreme Court nomination fight. It’s clear this will dominate the coming weeks and, if you’ve been following the news, you know exactly how this will play out. The secular left will attempt to vilify the nominee and stall the nomination.
_**“Amy Coney Barrett tied to far-right religious cult that believes women should ‘submit’ to husbands.”**_
That’s the headline from _Yahoo! News_ , and just one of many. The message is loud and clear -- religion is fine, as long as you don’t take it seriously.
Well I’ve got news for you. Amy Coney Barrett poses a threat because she does take her faith seriously. She has spoken proudly about her faith, biblical values, and her unwavering commitment to uphold the U.S. Constitution.
**Millions of Americans, including me, see her as an inspiration. And at My Faith Votes, our job is to ensure that every single one of them turns out to vote on November 3.** Because, once she is confirmed - and she will be \- the fight will begin in the Senate to “stack the court,” and change the rules to advance the progressive agenda.
We must take notice.
And last night’s debate concluded with voter fraud front and center - a threat that undermines fair elections and the very foundation of our Republic. **The call to action is clear: To eclipse the threat of unfair elections, Christians must vote and turn out in record numbers.**
**At My Faith Votes, we are working in every state and critical counties across the country to turn out Christians to the polls on November 3.**
We vote not only to elect leaders who share our values, but to send a very loud message. We are here, we’re not going anywhere, and we will lead this nation into the future.
**[So today, as we enter October -- the final full month of the 2020 campaign -- I ask you to recommit to this vital endeavor with a donation of anything you can afford.](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200930apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200930apl01nd&n=1)**
Everything we hold dear is on the line, which is why every single grassroots donation up to $550,000 is currently being matched dollar for dollar.
**[Today, right now, is your opportunity to double your impact, and I hope we can count on your ongoing support.](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200930apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200930apl01nd&n=2)**
Don’t allow yourself to get upset watching the treatment of a strong, successful Christian woman like Judge Barrett or discouraged by looming voter fraud. Instead, help us organize and together, let’s make November 3 a day the doubters never forget.
Thank you for your faithful support of this bold mission to see biblical values upheld in America.
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200930apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200930apl01nd&n=3)
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200930apl01nd&n=4)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200930apl01nd&n=5).

Yours in the fight,

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20Feenstra=20Kids?=
subject: A message from our family
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | Friend,
---
| Growing up, like most kids, we’ve learned a lot of lessons from our parents.

We’ve learned the value of a hard day of work, to treat others with respect and fairness, to love God and our country, to serve our community, and practice our faith. We’ve been fortunate to grow up in a community, Hull, IA, that reinforces these lessons and has given us opportunities to live them every day; but nothing has engrained these lessons in us as much as watching our dad, Randy Feenstra.

For most of our lives, we’ve grown up watching our dad serve the community and the state that he loves, first as Hull City Administrator, then Sioux County Treasurer, and for the last decade, Iowa State Senator. We’ve had the chance to see our dad live out his faith: he works hard every day, treats others with respect and fairness, gives back to his community, loves his country, and exemplifies how to live a Christian life.
---
|
---
| We Feenstra kids set a goal to raise $10,000 before the end of the month in order to help our dad reach every conservative voter in the District, and we’re almost there! Consider chipping in $10, $25, $50, $100 or whatever you can by midnight tonight to help out, and make sure to visit our dad’s [Facebook](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=e325328946&e=d48ad6f8f4), [Twitter](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=3e1ef86901&e=d48ad6f8f4), and [Website](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=f584738080&e=d48ad6f8f4) to learn more and keep up with what’s going on.
---
| [Click here to chip in!](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=75cce57553&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Click here to chip in!")
---
| Thank you all so much for your support!

-Taylor, Erika, Dawson, & Savannah Feenstra

PS – The end of the month deadline is coming up at 11:59 PM – would you be able to contribute before the deadline to help our dad cross the finish line with a win in November?
---
| [Contribute Here](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=d1ed982e53&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Contribute Here")
