name: Francys Johnson, Former President of the Georgia NAACP
subject: The truth about what Trump thinks of Black America.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by GBP, www
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19762235/254358712/-726301913?=true&refcode=em-09292020-PM-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmNTU2YTQ5LTVkMDMtZWIxMS05NmY1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYWZmYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wnTfuKnTt0vwlbGTyKDPvcvKi4yzf1Gdplp8OV8PtyU=) Friend, This has been a week of revelations about Donald Trump. _**Among them—a disturbing report revealing one of the most sinister and sophisticated attempts to suppress Black votes since Jim Crow.**_ Let’s be transparent on how voter outreach on traditional campaigns normally works. On a typical campaign, voters, regardless of party affiliation, are ranked from 1 to 5 in likelihood of voting for the candidate. A campaign’s mission is simple: convert voters who are 3’s into 4’s, and 4’s into 5’s, and then make sure the 5’s vote on election day. But now, thanks to a huge leak of Trump campaign data, we know that Trump and his lackeys used an alarming tactic to win in 2016. **They identified 3.5 million Black Americans in their voter database, but instead of finding ways to convince Black America to vote for Donald Trump, they labeled them and other minority groups with “Deterrence,” then they spent Trump’s campaign resources making sure those voters had the most miserable voting experience possible. These Draconian tactics hark back to America’s darkest days, and are the same strategies used by fascist governments and oppressive regimes across the globe.** _Friend_ _, how many African American voters have already been labeled as "deterrence" in 2020?_ We have to fight back. _**Make no mistake, election night 2020 is not on November 3rd, it is happening right now.**_ We have to secure our votes by voting as early as possible and creating a plan for our families regarding how we are going to vote in October and November. _[**I also want to encourage you to donate whatever you can to the Georgia Blue Project today, and help us pay for digital and television ads that will work to help those same Democrats win their elections in November and send a message to Donald Trump and his Republican enablers: Nothing can keep Georgia voters from doing their civil duty and kicking Trump to the curb.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19762236/254358713/-363837216?=true&refcode=em-09292020-PM-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmNTU2YTQ5LTVkMDMtZWIxMS05NmY1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYWZmYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wnTfuKnTt0vwlbGTyKDPvcvKi4yzf1Gdplp8OV8PtyU=)_ It will take every single one of us to defeat Donald Trump, and to put Georgia into the hands of leaders who believe in working for the people, not for their demagogue. —Francys Johnson [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19762237/254358714/-726301913?&amount=&refcode=em-09292020-PM-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmNTU2YTQ5LTVkMDMtZWIxMS05NmY1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYWZmYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wnTfuKnTt0vwlbGTyKDPvcvKi4yzf1Gdplp8OV8PtyU=) | |
---

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I'm only asking because it is powerfully important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
After Donald Trump's ugly display in last night's debate, it's never been more clear that we need to send him packing. But defeating that one desperate man won't be enough. We also need to send a mess | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251c0/45c30650/1c1439082/66e89e16/1167974956/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
After Donald Trump's ugly display in last night's debate, it's never been more clear that we need to send him packing.

But defeating that one desperate man won't be enough. We also need to send a message to all of the Republicans who've enabled him and cheered him on. And we need to address the root causes of the corruption that let him get elected in the first place.

That means taking back the Senate, winning an even bigger majority in the House, flipping state houses ahead of the next round of redistricting, and putting Democrats into office at every level of government.

By investing in grassroots organizing to elect Democrats up and down the ticket, we'll also help get out the vote for Joe Biden and Kamala Harris -- so that they win big, by a margin that won't leave this election in the hands of Trump's Supreme Court nominees.

To be able to keep making those critical investments, Warren Democrats has set a big quarterly fundraising goal. Today's our last chance to hit it. And we're not quite there yet.

**[If you can, please make a donation of $2 or whatever you can before midnight-- the last quarterly FEC fundraising deadline of this election -- to support Warren Democrats and help turn the page on this dark chapter in our nation's history.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251c0/45c30650/1c1439082/66e89e19/1167974956/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXNlcHQyMC13ZWVrbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVjI1Rl9FT1FfRVdEX0VfMjAyMDA5MzBfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-sept20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV25F_EOQ_EWD_E_20200930_V1S3_P")**

Tonight's deadline is our chance to remind Trump and his billionaire buddies that we are still in this fight -- and that we are going to defeat them.

Because let's be clear: Trump is lashing out and trying to cheat because he knows that he is losing. He knows that the American people see how badly he has failed to do his job. His only hope is to try to bully his way into a second term -- intimidating voters, giving marching orders to white supremacists, and making the whole process look hopelessly ugly to try to demoralize decent people from staying in the fight.

But if we organize together, fight together, and persist together, we will win together. We have the power to vote him out, defeat Trump-enabling Republicans across the country, and start making the big, structural change we need to make our country work for everyone -- not just a thin slice at the top.

**I'm going to do everything I can in the next five weeks to elect Democrats who will put power in the hands of the people. But I can't do it alone.**

**[Before the midnight deadline, if you're able to, please chip in to help hit this fundraising goal and support Warren Democrats. It is powerfully important.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251c0/45c30650/1c1439082/66e89e19/1167974956/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXNlcHQyMC13ZWVrbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVjI1Rl9FT1FfRVdEX0VfMjAyMDA5MzBfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-sept20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV25F_EOQ_EWD_E_20200930_V1S3_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251c0/45c30650/1c1439082/66e89e19/1167974956/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXNlcHQyMC13ZWVrbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVjI1Rl9FT1FfRVdEX0VfMjAyMDA5MzBfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-sept20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV25F_EOQ_EWD_E_20200930_V1S3_P")

subject: DEADLINE APPROACHING: Time to fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
Today is our last quarterly fundraising deadline before the election and we are in danger of being outraised by the far Left. If we come up short, the liberal mob will be thrilled. But if we hit our goals, they'll have to go to their safe spaces to cry. Will you help me fight back against the liberal mob and support President Trump's agenda?
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1ODEzMjUS1&kn=14&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MjU0NTM5NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1ODEzMjUS1&kn=22&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MjU0NTM5NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

If we come up short, the liberal mob will be thrilled. But if we hit our goals, it will be one more victory against the radical left.

[**Will you help me fight back against the liberal mob and support President Trump 's agenda?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1ODEzMjUS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MjU0NTM5NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

_**There are just a few weeks left to make a difference before Election Day.**_

Joe Biden's socialist Democrats and far-left rioters are pouring all of their money into this election in the hopes of controlling us. But I'm running ads attacking Joe Biden and with your help I can do even more.

Let's fight back and beat the liberal mob.

[**Please chip in whatever you can right now so we can keep fighting until Election Day.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1ODEzMjUS1&kn=15&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MjU0NTM5NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
As the daughter of immigrants, Linda Sanchez knows one thing better than most: the United States was built on the hard work of immigrants.
Now, as one of the highest-ranking Latinas in Congress, Linda is committed to fighting for immigrant communities.
[**With Linda 's final end-of-quarter fundraising deadline tonight, will you donate right now to send this fighter for the working class back to Congress? **](https://act.myngp.com/el/Vx-pBnj-C3B_gz6eCVlcn_ia7Zr87wota9uUG8_GhcU=/iGFHKxfJ_PtGHqRrD8u3Ww0SLUqEcJ63OSvipZ4nAww=?refcode=X_093020_EOQ_H)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Vx-pBnj-C3B_gz6eCVlcn_ia7Zr87wota9uUG8_GhcU=/y7A8F4_TEIdnEiIDChmW6JgsRw0mWQjQVum2SccXfn0=?refcode=X_093020_EOQ_H)
As a child, Linda saw her parents work long days and multiple jobs so they could give their children a better life. Her parents taught her the value of hard work, community, and giving back.
Today, she carries these lessons with her as she fights for comprehensive immigration reform, advocates for working families, and rejects Trump's xenophobic policies. Linda has lived the American dream -- and she wants to bring everyone along with her.
[**Help Linda hit her end-of-quarter fundraising goal by chipping in $10 now >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Vx-pBnj-C3B_gz6eCVlcn_ia7Zr87wota9uUG8_GhcU=/iGFHKxfJ_PtGHqRrD8u3Ww0SLUqEcJ63OSvipZ4nAww=?refcode=X_093020_EOQ_H)

Thank you!
_\-- Team S anchez_

We only have a handful of hours before our final fundraising numbers are due to the FEC.
**Nancy Pelosi is doing everything in her power to stop conservatives like us from taking back Congress in November – and it’s deadlines like these that make fighting back possible!**
Greg’s been focused on bringing our conservative Hoosier values front and center every time he steps onto the House floor, and that’s the last thing that Nancy wants to see in Washington.

name: FEC Reminder
subject: have you helped Sri out yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Hi, friend --

Making sure you got our finance director’s email from earlier. Right now we’re less than 8 hours away from tonight’s FEC deadline -- where Sri will need to report his best fundraising numbers of the year if he has any shot of keeping up his momentum and flipping TX-22 blue. And we’re still $9,500 short of our goal.

Can you help? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.30_b3_fecr_all&amount=25

-Team Sri

-------Forwarded Message-------
Date: September 30, 2020
Sender: Matt Gaze
Subject: You need to see this

Friend,

We’re down to the wire.

Tonight, this campaign will face its last FEC quarter deadline, which means it’s also our last chance of this election to prove our grassroots fundraising prowess to our opponents.

Not only has the power of our campaign piqued the interests of top conservative super PACs, but as statewide polls show Texas on the verge of flipping blue, national groups at the presidential level are starting to take notice, too.

So we need to make sure that we’re ready to file the strongest fundraising report of this election.

If we signal any vulnerability in these numbers -- we can expect our district to be flooded with even MORE spending by outside groups backing our opponent. Please donate now to help us close our $18,000 gap >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.30_b3_fecr_all&amount=25

Winning this election and sending Sri to Congress means we can make progress on the issues that matter -- like finally expanding access to affordable health care and stopping DC interests from buying politicians who want to gut Social Security and Medicare.

But to get there, we need you. We’re just hours away from our MIDNIGHT FEC fundraising deadline, and we need your help to reach our ambitious goal.

Can we count on you to help us get there? >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.30_b3_fecr_all&amount=25

Thanks,
Matt

Can you make it weekly?

Friend -- we’re just 5 weeks away from Election Day, and every dollar that comes through the door is immediately going back out to help us flip this seat. Your grassroots donations have put us on the path to victory, but now we need you to double down.

Can you commit to a $5 or more weekly donation between now and November 3rd? Even $5 goes a long way!

MAKE IT WEEKLY ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.30_b3_fecr_all&amount=5&recurring=1

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.30_b3_fecr_all&amount=25

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/

Paid for by Sri for Congress

SRI FOR CONGRESS
P.O. BOX 898
SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]

If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/bcdf083b-4403-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc/79096d6a-6703-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTA5NmQ2YS02NzAzLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BqeHUYFOpn0bGg1uAntfInluRbH8GKCdVphMGKuD2as=&id=117373579 .

| Hi there, **tonight at midnight is the deadline** for FEC campaign finance reports.It is _critical_ that we post a strong fundraising effort for the quarter.As you know, I had a tough primary fight last month and it drained our campaign funds. In fact, we are down to just $61,000 in the account and there’s only 34 days to go until the election.[**Can I ask one more time for your critical help?**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=5f74fff305c85463b12a4025&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fpaul-gosar-for-congress%2Fdonate&w=5d8babd15e0a4b5357b6f1b6&l=en-US&s=Hkor-wkDOLCI4Nq2jXAluLS9VFo%3D) My tireless efforts to help President Trump and his MAGA agenda have made me a target for the Left but you know I won’t back down.I will keep fighting - but I need you by my side. I hope I can count on you to help our team by midnight tonight. [**Click here to make a secure online donation**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=5f74fff305c85463b12a4025&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fpaul-gosar-for-congress%2Fdonate&w=5d8babd15e0a4b5357b6f1b6&l=en-US&s=Hkor-wkDOLCI4Nq2jXAluLS9VFo%3D)**.** Thank you again and God Bless, Paul

name: Lee Griffin For Congress

body:
Hi everyone, I know I don't usually send a mid-week newsletter, but after last night's debate I thought we could all use a pick-me-up. While
| | [**Can't See This Message?**_View in a browser_****](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/beNJVPkJb/c?w=yVao8C0ug4CikYlmvDvS4PJnVlE_SOKS0cavYpcDbEM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGVlZ3JpZmZpbmZvcmNvbmdyZXNzLmNvbS9zby9iZU5KVlBrSmIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJmZjkxYTIwZC1kYjE5LTQ0ZDUtYjNlZS05YjNmOGRiMGJjMmUifQ)

| | Hi everyone, I know I don't usually send a mid-week newsletter, but after last night's debate I thought we could all use a pick-me-up. While the debate was hard to watch, I appreciated Vice President Biden's poise and every time he looked into the camera to speak to the American people - it reminded me of how a real president addresses the nation. Last night's debate was also a reminder of how important it is for us to flip PA 12, this state and correct the path that our country is on. With 34 days to go, I believe that we can do this. We need to reach as many Independent and Republican voters as possible, and that means amping up our advertising on radio and in the newspaper, and - if we raise enough - TV ads. Tonight at 11:59pm we have our biggest fundraising deadline of the election. Please if you can, [donate to my campaign](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/beNJVPkJb/c?w=W2CJzed8fwc5bnYCmDJ8-gfu2mWEacRZ45LMgYKvvyg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xlZWdyaWZmaW5mb3Jjb25ncmVzcyIsInIiOiJiNGM4ZDAzZi02N2EyLTRjYTUtNjVhNC0zY2VkY2ZhMTg4MTAiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJmZjkxYTIwZC1kYjE5LTQ0ZDUtYjNlZS05YjNmOGRiMGJjMmUifQ). Every donation helps us to persuade more voters, which means more votes for the entire Democratic ticket. I am so grateful to each and every one of you for your continued support and belief in me and this campaign. I will do absolutely everything I can in the next 34 days to flip this district and to help Joe Biden become the next President of our proud nation. The future is ours! Take care and stay safe,Lee
---

When we first launched this campaign, November 3rd felt like years away. I’m incredibly honored that you would help us get this far. Peter, When we first launched this campaign, November 3rd felt like years away.
I’m incredibly honored that you would help us get this far.
We’ve reached some massive milestones thus far: ✅ We won a MASSIVE primary election that has led us to where we are today, ✅ We were endorsed by the President of the United States, ✅ And we month after month, continue to exceed goals for this campaign nobody thought we could meet.
But with that being said, a lot is at stake here this next month.
We are about to submit our FINAL End-of-Quarter reporting to the FEC, hit the final 30 days before election day, and have one final chance to win over voters.
There is nothing left beyond this, Peter. If we win on November 3rd, we’ll carry our strong and conservative values into Washington D.C., on behalf of the Lehigh Valley, but if we lose, we’ll allow Nancy Pelosi’s ally to hike our taxes, stand for socialist values, and NOT have our ear for the next two years.
Do you agree with me that she must be stopped?

name: Matt's iPhone
subject: Fwd: Need 550 Patriots by tomorrow night
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | Peter,
I wanted to reach out again regarding the 550 patriots needed to make a difference before the end-of-month deadline. The clock is quickly running out, and we remain significantly short of the necessary funds to reach our fundraising goal.
I need you to step up and help us get the job done before 11:59pm tonight.
You can click here: [https://gaetzforcongress.revv.co/email-need-550-patriots-fwd](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LXHv8JV0XIFAkig9IQvQYv4nQaGrnI8eJdjrjn6r_VoJJViMtevKkAGNmAQFMvfI7vs4mKz_6X3YCZqcCeGMLKODuMbg7oAAtTDZCTh6AaRVl-X8Ky7nOqDXU2kr_rTmOku8RO7H5B2AiSEKTxmRcnTkzwdm0HNTutA2RYdaPbBlkHMBRkOO-f3DVkdQmMDz&c=MrlsenO6adG3ueRVKnJY9Oln4f5Ab66HRv7nmWusHH0naPrYBbQPJA==&ch=6M8SLeuGWJjvCcUJHdFJ1IpLkxp1SU0HtHmPUYxmmjhW9W-h2665Og==)
There's a lot on the line this year. If we want to continue accomplishing our America First agenda, the time is now to get involved with the movement to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN--AGAIN!
Thanks for your support!
-Matt Gaetz
Sent from my iPhone, please excuse typos.

\------Begin forwarded message------ Subject: Need 550 Patriots by tomorrow night From: Gaetz Finance Team <[info@mattgaetz.com](mailto:info@mattgaetz.com)> Date: Tuesday, September 29, 2020 at 4:55:13 PM

---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LXHv8JV0XIFAkig9IQvQYv4nQaGrnI8eJdjrjn6r_VoJJViMtevKkAGNmAQFMvfI7vs4mKz_6X3YCZqcCeGMLKODuMbg7oAAtTDZCTh6AaRVl-X8Ky7nOqDXU2kr_rTmOku8RO7H5B2AiSEKTxmRcnTkzwdm0HNTutA2RYdaPbBlkHMBRkOO-f3DVkdQmMDz&c=MrlsenO6adG3ueRVKnJY9Oln4f5Ab66HRv7nmWusHH0naPrYBbQPJA==&ch=6M8SLeuGWJjvCcUJHdFJ1IpLkxp1SU0HtHmPUYxmmjhW9W-h2665Og==)
---
| Peter,
We need 550 patriots to step up before tomorrow night.

subject: While I’m on my walk...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
I’m out taking a walk right now, clearing my head for the debate tomorrow night.

|
---

I’m out taking a walk right now, clearing my head for the debate tomorrow night. You know how much is at stake in this election. We have to do everything we can to keep Pete Sessions out of Washington and away from the power he so eagerly abused for 22 years. But my team called, and I wanted to quickly reach out before it got too late. They told me that we’re so close to the end of our final end-of-quarter fundraising drive, and if we raise just $174 more, we’ll hit our goal. Here’s a link you can use to chip in $10 or $15 to get us one step closer: _**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rickkennedy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19767261/254378788/338717222?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200930EOQ6_RK_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjdkYWViMS03MDAzLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y-v3Nk4HJjjbkDKSL4w8erLH209rN7y0jlphjWhIpUs=)**_ Thanks, Rick (Sent from my iPhone) | | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress

subject: RE: I want to see if he has the nerve to lie to my face the way he’s lied in his commercials
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
I want to tell you how the race for Kentucky’s 6th District is shaping up. As expected, my opponent is airing commercial after commercial lying about my record. And he won’t commit to a series of public, televised debates.

|
---

| | This is it, team. We need you to chip in to our campaign before midnight tonight. [_**Can we count on you to help us hit our final fundraising deadline of the campaign?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19767362/254379219/-1729872895?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200930EOQ11_TH_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzdkYWViMS03MDAzLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mWk5A4nBDV-iVgbUJcPjcGV-BYX2MMelayj0odO-uw0=) Check out Josh's email below for his take on how this race is shaping up, and why your contribution **today** is so important. Thank you for being on our team, Team Hicks | | [**contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19767363/254379220/-1598371648?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200930EOQ11_TH_all_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzdkYWViMS03MDAzLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mWk5A4nBDV-iVgbUJcPjcGV-BYX2MMelayj0odO-uw0=)
---
\----------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: Josh Hicks
Date: September 30, 2020
Re: I want to see if he has the nerve to lie to my face the way he’s lied in his commercials
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19767364/254379221/-1729872895?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200930EOQ11_TH_all_xx_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzdkYWViMS03MDAzLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mWk5A4nBDV-iVgbUJcPjcGV-BYX2MMelayj0odO-uw0=)
Hey, everyone. It's Josh.
I’m writing to you today to ask if you can [_**chip in to my campaign before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19767365/254379222/-1729872895?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200930EOQ11_TH_all_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzdkYWViMS03MDAzLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mWk5A4nBDV-iVgbUJcPjcGV-BYX2MMelayj0odO-uw0=)
But first, I want to tell you how the race for Kentucky’s 6th District is shaping up.
As expected, my opponent is airing commercial after commercial lying about my record. **And he won’t commit to a series of public, televised debates.**
Just this week, he launched television ads falsely — and unbelievably — implying that my law firm is working against COVID relief efforts. Never mind that the cases he cited were both opened long before the pandemic and had nothing to do with COVID. **To mislead your own constituents about pandemic relief efforts is not only cynical — it’s extremely irresponsible.**
Now, nearly a month after I suggested a series of five television debates where voters could hear straight from us, I’ve received no response from Andy Barr. We sent him a certified letter to his Lexington PO Box. We got confirmation that the letter was delivered _and_ received. Heck, we even tweeted at him.
Since then, I’ve accepted invitations to debates hosted by WKYT and the League of Women Voters, KET, the Rotary Club of Lexington, and Together Frankfort.
Andy Barr has accepted only one invitation.
He doesn’t want to answer for the federal government’s incompetent response to the coronavirus.
He doesn’t want to explain why he’s taken millions of dollars from corporate PACs, the Wall Street banks, and the big drug companies that have ravaged our communities.
He doesn’t want to tell you why he’s bailed out huge corporations but failed to help our schools, fire departments, and police departments cover the cost of this pandemic.
**_I can only assume one thing: he’s scared._**
**And with just 34 days (and at least one debate) left to go,[I’m personally asking you to chip in to our campaign before tonight’s important fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19767366/254379223/-1729872895?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200930EOQ11_TH_all_xx_l3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzdkYWViMS03MDAzLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mWk5A4nBDV-iVgbUJcPjcGV-BYX2MMelayj0odO-uw0=)**
Our campaign needs your support — and we need it now.
What we raise now helps our campaign make important decisions about where and how we can invest in October, as voters weigh their options in the most important election of our lifetime. **And while we’re doing everything we can to hold Andy Barr accountable, we still haven’t met this last critical fundraising goal.**

Now, nearly a month after I suggested a series of five television debates where voters could hear straight from us, I’ve received no response from Andy Barr. We sent him a certified letter to his Lexington PO Box. We got confirmation that the letter was delivered and received. Heck, we even tweeted at him. Since then, I’ve accepted invitations to debates hosted by WKYT and the League of Women Voters, KET, the Rotary Club of Lexington, and Together Frankfort. Andy Barr has accepted only one invitation. He doesn’t want to answer for the federal government’s incompetent response to the coronavirus. He doesn’t want to explain why he’s taken millions of dollars from corporate PACs, the Wall Street banks, and the big drug companies that have ravaged our communities. Our performance in these final weeks will be heavily determined by whether or not we meet this goal -- and time is running out.
Did you see my note earlier, friend?

name: Troy Nehls
subject: Will you put us over the top?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Friend, I know I don’t need to tell you again what’s at stake for the election in November. We’re only a few weeks away, and I need everyone to step up their game if we’re going to keep TX-22 RED!
We are just $2,375 away from hitting our End-of-Quarter fundraising goal. Will you help by chipping in what you can right now? Even contributing just $10 or $20 at this point may make the difference between winning and losing.

name: Senator Tom Cotton
subject: Help French Hill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
Dear Peter,

We write to you to ask your support for our good friend Congressman French Hill. French has been a great partner here in Washington and has done an outstanding job representing Central Arkansas. It is critical that we send him back to Congress for another term to continue the good work he’s already been doing.Help French Hill http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1ODI3NTAS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MjU1MzQwMAS2&mt=1&rt=0 French has been an excellent voice representing Arkansas values. He is committed to rebuilding our economy and protecting our communities. He voted for the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act (TCJA) that cut taxes for Arkansas families and small businesses. French is also a dedicated defender of the unborn. French has sponsored legislation to reduce our dependency on China and to hold China accountable. He is fighting to bring key manufacturing jobs back home, which support our supply chain. French is committed to securing America’s medical supply chain by reducing our dependency on foreign manufacturers. French is working for patient-centered health care.In contrast, French’s opponent is a liberal activist that will align with the national Democratic Party.His opponent voted to allow abortions solely on the basis of a child having Down Syndrome His opponent also has voted to raise taxes time and time again. His opponent refers to the police as “upholding a 400-year-old system of oppression”, rather than recognizing the valuable role the police play in keeping our neighborhoods safe. His opponent supports government-controlled health care.Arkansans are ready to see Congress take action to help us all return safely to our routines, protect our communities, and get our economy back on track. French is a great partner as we work to represent Arkansans priorities in Washington. Sending French back to Congress to represent Central Arkansas is a top priority for us both.

Help French Hill http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1ODI3NTAS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MjU1MzQwMAS2&mt=1&rt=0 The fundraising deadline is September 30. Please show your support for French before then.

Please support Congressman Hill’s re-election bid http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1ODI3NTAS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MjU1MzQwMAS2&mt=1&rt=0 and help us to continue to represent Arkansas values in Washington, D.C.

Help French Hill http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1ODI3NTAS1&kn=3&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MjU1MzQwMAS2&mt=1&rt=0 Sincerely,

Senator John Boozman
Senator Tom Cotton

Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch.

| | Hey y’all, Mike here. My team and I have been working hard to get ready for the final stage of this election. In October, we’re going to ramp up our presence on TV, in digital ads, and on the ground. **We’ve got to reach as many voters as possible if we’re going to win this race.** Polls are showing that we’re statistically tied with McCaul, so it’s never been more critical that we don’t fall behind. name: John Kasich
subject: Tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
If last evening's debate underscored just one point, it would be that our nation is in desperate need of a healing. [ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=e56bee17ad494db3bd672ac970e0a18a&_e=oUWAQFp0QwatIf5xj97RYOGP2zBAMAi49E7D930c6pzHgkLiqcmkAkZ7DkYHOlhDuXxb8foJ1oPdHjK0yEpLpuUz2Zph-RdZ9NI7SiNuGOjR0Wa4Hoq37YNCkT3fgbVymU48Hu77kQ9ZbXiPT-kFbxtb2PHlXzd8xkYOaP-eYYUwhKZEE5b00kkcY-nxrgmwir_3cYW2qfWMxpZoNN8R_40p69ZfVSa4KaBE55ZPElYbPRyj_gWqA6O9w2UPDE2PYbrBfuiqxGknhiE1DjmyCg%3D%3D) | |
---
If last evening's debate underscored just one point, it would be that our nation is in desperate need of a healing. We simply cannot continue to rip each other to shreds and expect to be able to offer solutions to our nation's greatest challenges.

That's why I'm asking for your help as we seek to raise the funds to support members of the Problem Solvers Caucus. **We have a critical fundraising deadline at midnight tonight**. [Can you help us out?](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=e56bee17ad494db3bd672ac970e0a18a&_e=oUWAQFp0QwatIf5xj97RYBXK7vamlyo-FjYNDChjGXcp309Ir_QRb50wU8DRrBsOejSg8RzRHcM9p5DnSGZUKPvTw2E0D1ggMYiEaKA-kc3x9FV--SpzLgrlPCguDNKzT3aVRfSk8vybxUo1s0wixQ8LdKoQid4julQzVcJ2bEU2O1oqwnLG3m3MTvHqYfgdRdsKqC0oyAQJLHIIlUHmEfz8gh5Wca2MGtET1D5SXir08uXW1SJb3IKqGUqjUWVfBAjWjnpAbaiWTyMZCAvsBbhcXP0lfgt6lGr6jKpjirw%3D)

You can learn more in my earlier email below. Also, if you're interested, you can also view some of my remarks about the debate in an interview this morning ([view here](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=e56bee17ad494db3bd672ac970e0a18a&_e=oUWAQFp0QwatIf5xj97RYHakxSLi1CkbyXBWX_OVTMdzTfFeECmfu_cYYz5Ikf996taNlQCcRDSfs4UxXOOxUgWukXZ7Qo6ViSIeXWsAef-Tp9RaR0F0grMIOz8PzEIqYcu-Fg21f-U8L1EIGcVmHeQ2o2C8iomj0bcjrb4qSDhw_SW7hRmIS1kmnq_z_JtWJc53uVHXFYKGvR-LxF17o30V5y_PrJ6t7XqWD-inILiBlVw9RbRBAfy7ehrMjEmdHWVRq0JmfN0QS0IVrz5-TDfMNa9bTAqSt5M9pYQSHAeP4JShmDStYN1d4MzmjHwq)).

Thank you.

-John
|
---
**To:** Peter
**From:** John Kasich
**Date:** Sept. 26, 2020

I'm reaching out to you today about a special program we're launching.

We all know how dysfunctional America's politics are these days and that's especially the case with Congress, who have done very little these past years to successfully tackle the biggest challenges that we face.

But there is a bipartisan group of legislators that you may not know about that are part of the "[Problem Solvers Caucus.](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=e56bee17ad494db3bd672ac970e0a18a&_e=oUWAQFp0QwatIf5xj97RYI7Fv_XDMzdWEK-gTZfNR5er-6SPrtyxVSpbbhNiKvx4-t3piGjsOs96sRClxbAQrtSK8bB-iyZUixqpNOFraRXPEFqkBRoYWULI7y0cN-6Nvf1fvhk5u-ccyT4FDSZK-wxudkKqfad7bGWO4XPfHKO1mmruaHpDaOGP927d3AvpyqDfSrlwis4JbWcyA4saIh_a2AL06uqMUKBuEd5pZmkip--8LmagwCaBT2K4qlp4ovvYRnm2ej9Kmzh7RtStLSpfAkKBiZFKgy1NObNP7LM%3D)" They are working tirelessly to build compromise and get our government working to improve the lives of people again.

The program we're launching today aims to raise the funds to make maximum allowable contributions to the Republican members of this group who are in competitive re-election campaigns.

They are doing good and honorable service to our country and with your help, we can ensure they can keep it up. **[Will you consider making a donation right now to help us hit our goal?](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=e56bee17ad494db3bd672ac970e0a18a&_e=oUWAQFp0QwatIf5xj97RYBXK7vamlyo-FjYNDChjGXcp309Ir_QRb50wU8DRrBsOejSg8RzRHcM9p5DnSGZUKPvoef4J_yKzQcW1bMRHFkjH0eOKoa1_mncFHASvRCcorSJeW2oT2eIUPdpO8ZWErv-bXeJSKWcPdcyU4C2EnbMrO52PjGRvzExJZOyppCP6IWigQCFOvUAKWPf5jzePaVkDvajzidVbHZ7ASEG31NYNHoAUi4LFS3T2XaQMSXvooW1jJddA_KbqIV1wk7aXZ3e6PzrkOw8jbIRU96Ve7MY%3D)**
[Donate Now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=e56bee17ad494db3bd672ac970e0a18a&_e=oUWAQFp0QwatIf5xj97RYBXK7vamlyo-FjYNDChjGXcp309Ir_QRb50wU8DRrBsOejSg8RzRHcM9p5DnSGZUKOGlEmFqxaZ0_700unAXIQomXHXK5rWAq0H3ImKn63-f6wL4GOnYiJM8CMButYdxkkys7jLGTxSe8oiBByfVsH52ipq470NUWM5CYddu9UiDzfKOTJlGt88BDg8860fDemD8DeFbIYTcO_xYgAtbGDddebzxrTLRPPfMQnI_a9wUiEFOh_a2IW2bHrsTIgh3ZP3kd75kwRxJtp9Wavhjkfo%3D)
Thank you for your ongoing support!

-John

name: Bracken Hendricks, Evergreen Action
subject: A moment of clarity in the chaos
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
On last night's debate...and the next.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=3328%2E53494%2EYJmEKY) Friend, Last night, there was a moment of clarity amid the chaos. Did you hear it? In the final stretch of the first debate between Donald Trump and Joe Biden, moderator Chris Wallace of Fox News asked: "What do you believe about the science of climate change, and what will you do in the next four years to confront it?" Climate was not on the list of debate topics Wallace released to the public last week. In fact, it had been twelve years since a moderator asked a question on climate change in a general election debate. And yet, it made it in. That's because hundreds of thousands of people spoke up and demanded that climate be covered -- and our voices were heard. **[That's a huge win. But we can't let up now. Add your name to demand upcoming debate moderators ask more substantive questions about how Joe Biden and Donald Trump will approach the climate crisis.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1005?t=3&akid=3328%2E53494%2EYJmEKY)** Last night, Biden laid out a recovery agenda that would create millions of well-paying union jobs in a clean energy economy. He made a clear case for strong standards for American-made clean cars, retrofitting buildings to cut energy bills, and achieving 100% clean electricity by 2035. And while Trump refused to even denounce white supremacists, Biden's plan both acknowledges and addresses environmental racism. The contrast between Donald Trump and Joe Biden's views on the climate crisis could not be clearer. But the debate must become more substantial, and this crisis must be given the time it deserves on the main stage of the presidential debate. **[Let's urge upcoming debate moderators -- especially C-SPAN's Steve Scully, who will moderate in Miami (a city already on the frontlines of this crisis) -- to question Biden and Trump on their plans to address the climate crisis and rebuild the U.S. economy because American voters want to know. Add your name today!](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1005?t=4&akid=3328%2E53494%2EYJmEKY)** Remember: There wasn't supposed to be a climate question last night. It wasn't on the official list of topics. But because hundreds of thousands of people across the country spoke out for the climate, even Fox News could not ignore it. The work we're doing -- together, across the climate movement -- matters. We won't stop now. Thanks, Bracken Hendricks
Co-Founder and Senior Policy Advisor, Evergreen Action | [ADD YOUR NAME ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1005?t=5&akid=3328%2E53494%2EYJmEKY)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=3328%2E53494%2EYJmEKY). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Weinzapfel supports Election Day chaos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Would Weinzapfel defend your rights? Not on voting. Rokita will! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/weinzapfel-supports-election-day-chaos?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=47cb8cb970&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Hoosier Republican,

Liberal Democrat Attorney General nominee Jonathan Weinzapfel supports Election Day chaos. Todd Rokita wants to protect your ballot!

Just yesterday, a federal judge ruled that the State of Indiana is unable to administer our own elections. Instead of maintaining the practice of having all absentee ballots returned on Election Day, a judge decided that ballots can trickle in for several days afterwards, delaying the outcome and possibly opening vote counting to nefarious activity.

**And where does liberal Jonathan Weinzapfel stand on this?**

**As Attorney General, Weinzapfel would allow such activist rulings to occur without defending Hoosiers. He supports this decision to arbitrarily extend Election Day and delay vote counting.**

Thankfully, the Attorney General’s Office is fighting this ruling, something, if elected, Todd Rokita would do as well. **We know where liberal Jonathan Weinzapfel stands. He wouldn’t lift a finger.**
---
| | [Defend Your Rights: Support Todd Rokita for Attorney General!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=173267fe8f&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Defend Your Rights: Support Todd Rokita for Attorney General!")
---
| If Jonathan Weinzapfel won’t defend your fundamental voting rights, what other laws will he not defend?
* Will he defend the sanctity of life?
* Will he defend your Second Amendment Rights?
* Will he defend our brave men and women in law enforcement?

**It’s clear: Jonathan Weinzapfel will outsource legislative duties to an activist judicial branch. That’s not how our system was designed and not what Hoosiers want in an Attorney General.**

**[If you want to make sure we elect Todd Rokita this Novemebr -- and stop Weinzapfel and his liberal agenda in its tracks -- please consider donating $10, $25, $50 or $100 today.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f87073c1f4&e=1acd9bb3d6)**

We need an Attorney General who will vigorously defend our elections, our laws, and our rights.

Todd Rokita will be that Attorney General.

-Your Indiana Republican Party
---
| [Defend Your Rights: Support Todd Rokita for Attorney General!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a94a76bbd6&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Defend Your Rights: Support Todd Rokita for Attorney General!")

It’s clear: Jonathan Weinzapfel will outsource legislative duties to an activist judicial branch. That’s not how our system was designed and not what Hoosiers want in an Attorney General. We need an Attorney General who will vigorously defend our elections, our laws, and our rights. Todd Rokita will be that Attorney General. -Your Indiana Republican Party | "Defend Your Rights: Support Todd Rokita for Attorney General!" | | id:2020-04-28-19:45:12:543t | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved.

body:
Friend,

I know it’s getting late, but I can’t relax.

We’re just a couple hours away from our FEC filing cut off, and I’m nervous about our numbers.

If we don't make tonight's goal, not only will we be sending a message of weakness to our opponents, but we’ll also be forced to make cuts to our ground game -- something we really can’t afford with 34 days left.

I know you’ve been inundated with fundraising asks lately -- but I wouldn’t ask if it didn’t matter.

We’re on the verge of flipping this seat blue -- and after the year our country has had -- we cannot leave this election up to chance.

I’m ready to go to Washington and fight for you, because I won’t rest until we’ve lowered health care costs, protected Social sScurity, and restored our standing in the world.

But to get there, I need you with me tonight. What do you say: Are you in?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.30_b4_s_all&amount=25

-Sri

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.30_b4_s_all&amount=25

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Data by age group
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
We've received a lot of questions since we unveiled the new data dashboard last week about how our new cases are distributed by age. Today I want to share some information that will help illustrate what we saw in the data over the past few weeks.
This graph shows the three-day average of cases among different age groups over the last two months:
---
|
---
| As you can see, every line is relatively flat, and in fact generally decreasing, with one notable exception. The red line, which indicates cases among people 19-24 years old, had a big spike about two weeks ago. We're not alone in this; it's an age group in which states across the country are seeing spikes. Locally, we've worked closely with our college leaders to get this under control. You'll note that the line has now dropped back down, but it's still the cohort in which we are seeing the most new cases.
I want to be clear - although we have seen outbreaks among some student groups, most college students and young adults are trying to do the right thing. Student leaders have stepped up on their campuses to help provide safe activities and ensure the public health guidance reaches the student body. I'm incredibly grateful to them, and we want their input on how we can better reach college students and other young adults. Today, I announced that we're convening a Young Adult Task Force led by students from across Rhode Island's colleges and universities, as well as local leaders and representatives of high-density communities.
I hope that this new look at the data is helpful to you in understanding how COVID-19 is spreading in our communities. No matter what your age, please remember the 3Ws: wear a mask, wash your hands, and watch your distance any time you're near other people.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LoT5Fg9OzSKupNQGwld8VOsEtthvqrUOuBcyGaXVOouV_E9Y3hI4BYwsvVogCpcKtoWKN75t3q8hJ-M44jhuig7hF-tCAET_FXeT53ZhUO-XrlT0adrfaYuLRjFO-imewa8uToj6Mi5q4gkTMl2DQctKFWL8AuQZvhkpz9JdIKGustqBX3qeuysF6xQad8EeyFqVZ4QT-M-LrpYvW78lqJe3-09UAIQoCW4NYNrtkKfvAasjN2C-xybxiS1ZLOyO03oyQ7ZYIJv8bYu4jEoKbgbJ41IPZqWWC3O8Qey7TBmsNaDsyYPJCggCVATc3nMi7HeyKFIk2Rw=&c=jqMCEgklUQ0WSqbCtjjXCCa0s8LGV02nJi3_3UASznmUUUnjp_umAQ==&ch=C_VF05E6rK3Mpa9urRGxY_fPwZtPseyyB8XTGRyAN9y0PMP89jk0cg==).

name: Bruce, Team Warner Campaign Manager
subject: This election is about who we are...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
and who we want to be as a country.
|
---

| | Derek --

We're 34 days away from Election Day on November 3rd. We're in the home stretch, but that doesn't mean we can afford to lose steam.

I remember 2014, when Mark Warner was projected to win handily -- and the race was decided by fewer than 17,000 votes. I'm sure our whole team remembers that.

That's why we're doubling down on our efforts to make sure Virginians are registered and informed about how they can cast their ballots this year. We need to replicate the record Democratic turnout that we saw on Super Tuesday if we're going to bring this home.

There is so much at stake: this election is our chance to get Donald Trump out of the White House and get this country back on track. **_Plus, we have a real path to the Senate majority, but that can only happen if we hang onto seats like Mark 's._

[Can you chip in to help us keep Mark in the Senate and pave the way for a Democratic majority?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da9f/53d9897e/55823b30/1c88e29b/930139641/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgzNSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-finishline?refcode=20200930_f_1_nd__835__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

As I watched the debate last night, I had to remind myself to keep channeling the anger I feel at the mismanagement of our nation into action.

**Right now, our country is being led by a President who doesn 't pay his taxes and won't answer for thousands of American deaths on his watch.** And Mark's opponent supports him unconditionally -- he appeared with Trump at his rally in Newport News, and he's indicated he'd be just another rubber stamp for the Trump agenda if elected. We have the power to make sure that doesn't happen.

We can't let ourselves get discouraged -- we're almost to the finish line. Help us get there.

**[Chip in to keep Mark Warner in the Senate, fighting for us.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da9f/53d9897e/55823b30/1c88e29a/930139641/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgzNSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-finishline?refcode=20200930_f_1_nd__835__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thank you.

-- Bruce, Team Warner Campaign Manager

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da9f/53d9897e/55823b30/1c88e299/930139641/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgzNSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-finishline?refcode=20200930_f_1_nd__835__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Kara Eastman
subject: hey, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eastman for Congress
body:
Hope all is well
|
---

| | Peter, this is really hard to talk about, but I wanted you to hear about this from me directly before tonight's End of Quarter deadline.

The New York Times just revealed that the presidential race could be decided by my district.

**[But they also dropped that according to new polling, Don Bacon is beating me by 2 points.](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e877/77d4c309/21d28cc5/2635dc52/2414602336/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200929_em_fr_b2_kara_90op&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")**

I need to regain my lead in the polls ASAP, so I'm personally asking: **[Peter, will you make your first donation before my End of Quarter Deadline in 8 hours? >> _https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/Last-Chance#Peter Willis_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e877/77d4c309/21d28cc5/2635dc52/2414602336/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200929_em_fr_b2_kara_90op&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")**

Peter, it's been devastating to see Don Bacon take the lead in the polls, especially when all eyes are on our district.

But I refuse to throw in the towel, this race is still far too close to call. I know that I can win this, but I need your help.

**[If I can raise $12,750 by my End of Quarter Deadline in 8 hours, I will be able to increase critical campaign spending and regain my lead in the polls.](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e877/77d4c309/21d28cc5/2635dc52/2414602336/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200929_em_fr_b2_kara_90op&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")**

Peter, this is a crucial make-or-break moment, and I need you to step up and make your first donation to my campaign today.

Even a few extra dollars could decide this race, so I'm personally asking: **[Peter, will you chip in before my public End of Quarter Deadline?](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e877/77d4c309/21d28cc5/2635dc52/2414602336/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200929_em_fr_b2_kara_90op&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")**

If you donate using this link, I will be personally notified! >> **_[https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/Last-Chance#Peter Willis](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e877/77d4c309/21d28cc5/2635dc52/2414602336/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200929_em_fr_b2_kara_90op&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")_**

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e877/77d4c309/21d28cc5/2635dc5e/2414602336/VEsHBQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e877/77d4c309/21d28cc5/2635dc59/2414602336/VEsHBA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e877/77d4c309/21d28cc5/2635dc58/2414602336/VEsHBw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

body:

---
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19771792/254410068/-525632999?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS83ODUyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjllMDk0Mi04MzAzLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WX_EHA-xxOTrQFRXvCrh_fS6eoE9HvR76mSxwjUrx_M=&emci=2eb6e116-6603-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=769e0942-8303-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=1959553)

Hi Peter,

Every year at Power Summit, Voto Latino Foundation gathers to celebrate and educate the Latinx Community. And we have some exciting news: We’re taking this year’s Power Summit online via LiveWebinar! **Special guests will include Rosario Dawson, Julián Castro, and María Teresa Kumar.**

You won’t want to miss this --- we’ll be discussing some of today’s most pressing issues around voting such as registration, activism, and making a plan to vote. More than 500 young Latinx activists and leaders will be logging on for a day of online networking, learning, and fun. Best of all, it’s free!
* Media Training: Ready to make your voice heard?
* Building the People's House: Race and implicit bias within organizing
* How to Run for Elected Office
* Disinfo Defense League - How to Combat Disinformation Targeting the Latinx Community
* Power the Polls - The Need for Poll Workers this Election

So please, join us Friday October 2nd at 1pm ET/ 10am PT. **[Make sure to RSVP here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19771793/254410069/-525632999?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS83ODUyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjllMDk0Mi04MzAzLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WX_EHA-xxOTrQFRXvCrh_fS6eoE9HvR76mSxwjUrx_M=&emci=2eb6e116-6603-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=769e0942-8303-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=1959553)** to stay up to date on speakers, schedules, and special trainings.

By standing together, we can make sure our voices are heard by empowering our community and mobilizing voters before Election Day.

En La Lucha,

The VL Team
[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19771794/254410070/-1632467106?refcode=20200930&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS83ODUyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjllMDk0Mi04MzAzLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WX_EHA-xxOTrQFRXvCrh_fS6eoE9HvR76mSxwjUrx_M=)

subject: I can only assume one thing: Andy Barr is scared.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
I want to tell you how the race for Kentucky’s 6th District is shaping up. As expected, my opponent is airing commercial after commercial lying about my record. And he won’t commit to a series of public, televised debates.

|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19771820/254410517/-1729872895?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200930EOQ9rs_JH_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjQ2MmI4YS04MzAzLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rI18QOEadQAdvsy0l0E3Sji_5m8mf_QOnEMO4y4Syws=)
| | Hey, everyone. It's Josh. I’m writing to you today to ask if you can [_**chip in to my campaign before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19771821/254410518/-1729872895?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200930EOQ9rs_JH_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjQ2MmI4YS04MzAzLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rI18QOEadQAdvsy0l0E3Sji_5m8mf_QOnEMO4y4Syws=) But first, I want to tell you how the race for Kentucky’s 6th District is shaping up. As expected, my opponent is airing commercial after commercial lying about my record. **And he won’t commit to a series of public, televised debates.** Just this week, he launched television ads falsely — and unbelievably — implying that my law firm is working against COVID relief efforts. Never mind that the cases he cited were both opened long before the pandemic and had nothing to do with COVID. **To mislead your own constituents about pandemic relief efforts is not only cynical — it’s extremely irresponsible.** Now, nearly a month after I suggested a series of five television debates where voters could hear straight from us, I’ve received no response from Andy Barr. We sent him a certified letter to his Lexington PO Box. We got confirmation that the letter was delivered _and_ received. Heck, we even tweeted at him. Since then, I’ve accepted invitations to debates hosted by WKYT and the League of Women Voters, KET, the Rotary Club of Lexington, and Together Frankfort. Andy Barr has accepted only one invitation. He doesn’t want to answer for the federal government’s incompetent response to the coronavirus. He doesn’t want to explain why he’s taken millions of dollars from corporate PACs, the Wall Street banks, and the big drug companies that have ravaged our communities. He doesn’t want to tell you why he’s bailed out huge corporations but failed to help our schools, fire departments, and police departments cover the cost of this pandemic. **_I can only assume one thing: he’s scared._** **And with just 34 days (and at least one debate) left to go,[I’m personally asking you to chip in to our campaign before tonight’s important fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19771822/254410519/-1729872895?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200930EOQ9rs_JH_all_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjQ2MmI4YS04MzAzLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rI18QOEadQAdvsy0l0E3Sji_5m8mf_QOnEMO4y4Syws=)** Our campaign needs your support — and we need it now. What we raise now helps our campaign make important decisions about where and how we can invest in October, as voters weigh their options in the most important election of our lifetime. **And while we’re doing everything we can to hold Andy Barr accountable, we still haven’t met this last critical fundraising goal.** [_**If you're able, please consider making a donation of $36 before midnight tonight.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19771830/254410527/-1729872895?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200930EOQ9rs_JH_all_ld_l3&amount=36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjQ2MmI4YS04MzAzLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rI18QOEadQAdvsy0l0E3Sji_5m8mf_QOnEMO4y4Syws=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: I want to tell you how the race for Kentucky’s 6th District is shaping up. As expected, my opponent is airing commercial after commercial lying about my record. And he won’t commit to a series of public, televised debates. | = | | Hey, everyone. It's Josh. I’m writing to you today to ask if you can = But first, I want to tell you how the race for Kentucky’s 6th District is shaping up. As expected, my opponent is airing commercial after commercial lying about my record. And he won’t commit to a series of public, televised debates. Just this week, he launched television ads falsely — and unbelievably — implying that my law firm is working against COVID relief efforts. Never mind that the cases he cited were both opened long before the pandemic and had nothing to do with COVID. To mislead your own constituents about pandemic relief efforts is not only cynical — it’s extremely irresponsible. Now, nearly a month after I suggested a series of five television debates where voters could hear straight from us, I’ve received no response from Andy Barr. We sent him a certified letter to his Lexington PO Box. We got confirmation that the letter was delivered and received. Heck, we even tweeted at him. Since then, I’ve accepted invitations to debates hosted by WKYT and the League of Women Voters, KET, the Rotary Club of Lexington, and Together Frankfort. Andy Barr has accepted only one invitation. He doesn’t want to answer for the federal government’s incompetent response to the coronavirus. He doesn’t want to explain why he’s taken millions of dollars from corporate PACs, the Wall Street banks, and the big drug companies that have ravaged our communities. He doesn’t want to tell you why he’s bailed out huge corporations but failed to help our schools, fire departments, and police departments cover the cost of this pandemic. I can only assume one thing: he’s scared. And with just 34 days (and at least one debate) left to go,= Our campaign needs your support — and we need it now. What we raise now helps our campaign make important decisions about where and how we can invest in October, as voters weigh their options in the most important election of our lifetime. subject: UPDATE: Judge Amy Coney Barrett meets with Senate Majority Leader
body:
Vice President Pence accompanied Judge Amy Coney Barrett, President Trump’s latest nominee for the Supreme Court... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9414fd174c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 30, 2020
---
| | |
# **UPDATE: Judge Amy Coney Barrett meets with Senate Majority Leader**

**Vice President Pence** accompanied Judge Amy Coney Barrett, President Trump’s latest nominee for the Supreme Court, to meet with Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell on Capitol Hill yesterday.

**“We believe the Senate** has an opportunity, Leader, for a fair and respectful consideration hearing,” the Vice President said. “We urge our Democrat colleagues in the Senate to take the opportunity to meet with Judge Barrett and, as the hearing goes forward, to provide the kind of respectful hearing that the American people expect.”

** [In Photos: Vice President Pence and Judge Barrett visit Senate](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=23adc6de27&e=3ee4985eea)

Judge Barrett** **will serve** the American people with honor and distinction on the Supreme Court. Her extensive experience as a professor and litigator, record of academic success, and outstanding judicial resume make her an excellent choice.

**After President Trump** nominated Barrett for the Seventh Circuit Court of Appeals in 2017, every full-time member of the Notre Dame Law School faculty signed a letter of support for her confirmation. Every law clerk who served a Supreme Court justice during the term that Barrett clerked for Justice Antonin Scalia also endorsed her nomination.

**“****I had the opportunity** to meet with Judge Barrett earlier today,” Leader McConnell said. “President Trump has nominated exactly the kind of outstanding person whom the American people deserve to have on their highest Court.”

**Vice President Pence** said he looks forward to working with Senate Republicans—as well as Democrats if they are willing—to discharge their duties to advise the President and consent in the confirmation of Judge Barrett to the Supreme Court.

**🎬** [**Vice President Pence: Judge Barrett represents the best of America**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7bfa95e2c3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **WATCH: President Trump and First Lady honor Gold Star families**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6028e32ad4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump** welcomed Gold Star families to the White House over the weekend to honor the sacrifices of their loved ones. Gold Star families are those who have lost an immediate family member in service to our country.

**“We hold in our** **hearts** those who have answered the knock on the door, accepted the flag folded with precision, said their final farewell, and borne the absence of their fallen hero,” President Trump’s proclamation reads.

**“Americans of every generation** owe a debt of gratitude to the men and women who gave their lives in service to this Nation and to their families who remain forever changed.”

[**Read the President’s Proclamation on Gold Star Mother’s & Family’s Day. **](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1f5386d705&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

|
---

Federal election law requires political committees to use best efforts to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 during an election cycle. An individual may not contribute more than a total of $2,800 (maximum for Primary Election) per election to the committee. Federal law prohibits contributions to the committee from the general treasury funds of a corporation, labor organizations or national banks (including corporate or other business entity credit cards), from any person contributing another’s funds, from a Federal government contractor, or from a foreign national who lacks permanent resident status.

Thank you for fighting with us, Pence Campaign HQ | Federal election law requires political committees to use best efforts to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 during an election cycle. An individual may not contribute more than a total of $2,800 (maximum for Primary Election) per election to the committee. Federal law prohibits contributions to the committee from the general treasury funds of a corporation, labor organizations or national banks (including corporate or other business entity credit cards), from any person contributing another’s funds, from a Federal government contractor, or from a foreign national who lacks permanent resident status. | | | Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress | | PO Box 275 Taylorsville, IN 47280 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Patty Murray
subject: Why I'm asking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Team,
I am sure you're getting a lot of emails about the FEC's big deadline tonight. I wanted to reach out with a personal request -- and let you know why your support is so important in this fight.
Through our Sprint to 2020, we have been doing everything in our power to ensure that we flip the Senate -- but after the loss of Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg, our fight is even more urgent. Affordable health care, abortion rights, LGBTQIA+ equality, and more is at risk.
**[I'm working hard to help my Democratic colleagues defend their seats and elect more great, new Democratic leaders from across the country -- but I can't do it alone. If you're with me, pitch in $5 now to help meet my $40,000 goal before midnight.](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200927-eoq?refcode=em200930am-i_498&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
I know Democrats can win these important fights for our future -- but we can only do it if we all do everything we can now through November, and that starts by finishing this third quarter in the strongest possible position to win.
That's why I'm asking for your help with this crucial fundraising goal:
**[Make a $5 contribution now to join my Sprint to 2020 and help me take back the Senate.](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200927-eoq?refcode=em200930am-i_498&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
I am so proud to be in this fight with each and every one of you.
Thank you,
Patty

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200927-eoq?refcode=em200930am-i_498&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****
** **

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let us know if you would like to [unsubscribe](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a693388/22080b68/7a5ff060/460217c8/648140792/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "http://act.pattymurray.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join us today in fighting for progressive values and resisting Trump's agenda: [donate now](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a693388/22080b68/7a5ff060/460217cf/648140792/VEsD/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-emailfooter?recurring=yes").

name: Tom Perez
subject: President Obama asked. Will you answer, Derek?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
The Democratic Unity Fund is an essential component of our winning strategy, and at this final stage of the race your support could not be more crucial to our success. | |
---
Derek -- **In a moment, I’m going to ask you to[make a $7 donation to the Democratic Unity Fund today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yvqIHX1w_o-PUnYnshQlwipii7mAiI57TvDoH7KdkS2FEgVYFHYEagwLpu9kmkhh_Nxje731d1lRNeiImkS3rSLv-nkbl6G5W6D4cRLjkDWLheAbJ-FOiSSY6Bre_gIfsQ1oje2qzrGvxmkWmBTrEwsf_aYvT811irrkvr-Uew-eXCiiDhGn4AcBI1YPYoqYNT6RelPMr6ZNcXFAc91zlBA7gyJH87SJQuZMag_ISgk3vxHCBNmaLJxOLt5EUT7kHL-bGRv1kgZKAzvxwmubtOEx1-3NaM3fkb0Z8SKHFEElmQaSDeHGe2-5G77Gk9KvcpPSZtXKenw7etYwwsHz91bj2wfc5k0VQjaCQvSQJRUyUKKuz5WqJ3ZkuFhT-rb96VXfrUg9WeSryGkQPH49y56ifOxQpjAsHMilSEjgU5cYqW0ZzxkoICM9kizuVVTix9KhroMGzs36JC9CnA5GOu8sUx2GKS_pww4rQ0Tg2Pulx0uhh7YduLh9Q-X4zE1zI5p4dHAyZKxQ7jIFqUSQcNxSckgZKXzn7y1bHQSuHB9zhyRIKy4YmPfDuU1eIFKVM8jxiF_LVjj77I4RZiEABtS2PGkBMhh0H5iaYHVo6XvmFxWc4QX-1BkFQvwEWbr0k/35m/m2GpxhbaQSyJIv_u9HPMtw/h0/jrstjbzy2RheM0ktPPFSsx0ClJ1pxe6i0yvu6qV5F5w)** I hope you’ll give me the chance to explain why the fund is essential to a Democratic victory in November and how your support could not come at a more critical time for our party. Back in May of 2019, **President Barack Obama announced the Democratic Unity Fund alongside the DNC because he understood that our success in 2020 was going to depend on a strong nationwide party infrastructure.** At the time, the fund was a promise to our eventual nominee that they’d have a united and well-organized DNC ready to spring into action the moment the general election started. And Derek, we’ve delivered on that promise. [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yvqIHX1w_o-PUnYnshQlwipii7mAiI57TvDoH7KdkS2FEgVYFHYEagwLpu9kmkhh_Nxje731d1lRNeiImkS3rSz4EebBzC2oKK3F9VlQ9i9qjroOEl_Ap9AYZpAM9msTROm67RsM5OaSHih9CQGNCdvA40rPKlqe69lZ4C9WU7yy-CgyIrXoxeLenqLK4aZDKr04Oj2BZO6aEg1GqUPKA2_LJGz3wDBfrg6LRjNcosIKFqq5wzVhp2NMNyGtqGGvjx8vowjLdzHPOkggLSDSXxownPo0E9XOCIYdMDOSVtVQjtAaRbLdtMJbPKKPuGcxd0e49T439m65qjYsqdBqYXOgXrZHQyO2zkII4TUL0Lrlwhnz5yCN64dLfXaRKtGcZzpkyj1u7vPTKgGKXdfF19JE4F58vfatt4-vh1-OvrUtQS4i_7KAAKc3v8eVQUwxqWLA8gSlL-UQouVXumEghC4dazK8Dk7keH93tioxCsyqW-h8QzRPxCmVrnVwcSCnM0V7Q7MKeFIPhJc9mxhg6YKhFYU3Mz1wS_zJQQTAIr4ip3fhE3JswmyCEFJkqMjw-gOm8WjLsBN9QaR5a1dxcfkpwdAdI3otNG9DlRXmebHJjpi77ZZf7oABdFIBMLqno/35m/m2GpxhbaQSyJIv_u9HPMtw/h1/H9KTJ_qHT9dgZBLGWYdBmbR960k3cdHDlMG8DVCMDE8) Since President Obama launched the Democratic Unity Fund, **more than 254,000 donors have pledged their support.** This has allowed us to power critical DNC programs like the Data Warehouse, our massive effort to revitalize our voter data and unify the progressive ecosystem, and the DNC War Room, an initiative dedicated to holding Donald Trump and his administration accountable. Now that Joe Biden is our nominee, the Democratic Unity Fund is a critical resource in sustaining our voter outreach programs. clean_body: The Democratic Unity Fund is an essential component of our winning strategy, and at this final stage of the race your support could not be more crucial to our success. | | Derek -- In a moment, I’m going to ask you to I hope you’ll give me the chance to explain why the fund is essential to a Democratic victory in November and how your support could not come at a more critical time for our party. Back in May of 2019, President Barack Obama announced the Democratic Unity Fund alongside the DNC because he understood that our success in 2020 was going to depend on a strong nationwide party infrastructure. At the time, the fund was a promise to our eventual nominee that they’d have a united and well-organized DNC ready to spring into action the moment the general election started. And Derek, we’ve delivered on that promise. Since President Obama launched the Democratic Unity Fund, more than 254,000 donors have pledged their support. This has allowed us to power critical DNC programs like the Data Warehouse, our massive effort to revitalize our voter data and unify the progressive ecosystem, and the DNC War Room, an initiative dedicated to holding Donald Trump and his administration accountable. Now that Joe Biden is our nominee, the Democratic Unity Fund is a critical resource in sustaining our voter outreach programs. As you read this email, folks all over the country are already casting their ballots. With each passing day, we lose opportunities to reach potential Democratic voters, so there is no time to waste. Derek, will you answer President Obama’s call and donate $7 to the Democratic Unity Fund so that we can support the critical programs that Democrats up and down the ballot -- including Joe Biden -- are relying on as we head into this final stretch of the election? The Democratic Unity Fund is a crucial resource in the fight to defeat Donald Trump and his Republican allies down the ballot -- but it's only as strong as we make it. Take a look at some of the people who’ve thrown their support behind the fund so far: This is the most important election of our lifetimes, and we have one shot to elect compassionate, responsible leadership nationwide in November. Voting is already happening, so the time to act is now. Here is what we have on file for you: | In unity, Tom Tom Perez Chair Democratic National Committee

name: Kara Eastman
subject: hey, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eastman for Congress
body:
Hope all is well
|
