| | Peter, this is really hard to talk about, but I wanted you to hear about this from me directly before tonight's End of Quarter deadline.

The New York Times just revealed that the presidential race could be decided by my district.

**[But they also dropped that according to new polling, Don Bacon is beating me by 2 points.](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e874/77d4c309/21ecffa2/2635dc32/1511639857/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200929_em_fr_b2_kara_ia&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")**

I need to regain my lead in the polls ASAP, so I'm personally asking: **[Peter, will you make your first donation before my End of Quarter Deadline in 6 hours? >> _https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/Last-Chance#Peter Willis_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e874/77d4c309/21ecffa2/2635dc32/1511639857/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200929_em_fr_b2_kara_ia&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")**

Peter, it's been devastating to see Don Bacon take the lead in the polls, especially when all eyes are on our district.

But I refuse to throw in the towel, this race is still far too close to call. I know that I can win this, but I need your help.

**[If I can raise $12,750 by my End of Quarter Deadline in 6 hours, I will be able to increase critical campaign spending and regain my lead in the polls.](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e874/77d4c309/21ecffa2/2635dc32/1511639857/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200929_em_fr_b2_kara_ia&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")**

Peter, this is a crucial make-or-break moment, and I need you to step up and make your first donation to my campaign today.

Even a few extra dollars could decide this race, so I'm personally asking: **[Peter, will you chip in before my public End of Quarter Deadline?](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e874/77d4c309/21ecffa2/2635dc32/1511639857/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200929_em_fr_b2_kara_ia&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")**

If you donate using this link, I will be personally notified! >> **_[https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/Last-Chance#Peter Willis](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e874/77d4c309/21ecffa2/2635dc32/1511639857/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200929_em_fr_b2_kara_ia&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")_**

Thanks for your support,

Kara

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e874/77d4c309/21ecffa2/2635dc3e/1511639857/VEsHBQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e874/77d4c309/21ecffa2/2635dc39/1511639857/VEsHBA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e874/77d4c309/21ecffa2/2635dc38/1511639857/VEsHBw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132
info@eastmanforcongress.com

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: One Indiana - the best steakhouses in Indiana
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
WARNING: THE FOLLOWING LIST COULD PROVOKE HUNGER. [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d0cd016de3a244e98a95a8b3a0aabd7c&_e=F2Uwd9P61jrnJ5sDaLVnjL3PwH-45OvrWYbUtIrjrvkHTz0_YWg3CNc1I3o7AuMehmrmdnxgGVL9HLfwrZDELfe5h3uXz8N56lwuVHVqSQsVBRDeFqYnDA8oq8GoneUZ2JhJUlpQZb-PJPJ1O4NWnRtM1rwOpEvALnJGB6Il6SSCSVVNjmg8_VnEB4rNmza3NQH_Gbdrr3mtyldDvo_yP7xxRrsShiGa08Vk7Sgs98A3BIStGQY5IYoIoGi9pB_GRmll9VpLwZML8Qx-A-j_KhBTN1ABDxkE9y1uAvEBdUfm5S6hw1_lnLQBW8R8j_pYDsSgKuZyfTb0xFYWAHlRSZQGG_a3K2f1J_yy_l9OPtQKztkT16FA1iX65hmoI0F-OpDg0kYapyuy5NKokFredaZd4QXJ82jEMnQWI_r7Di51o60nLVaeRMWNvnLIMcKOY-MiqWsj4R6pqoBqvHBQLjDgi53JvvTKGfydL2WO_y0%3D) Friends, **WARNING: THE FOLLOWING LIST COULD PROVOKE HUNGER.**
_There’s nothing better than a great steak._
This is a principle we firmly stand by here at the Holcomb Crew. Eric has spent a lot of time at these amazing steakhouses across Indiana throughout the years -- small businesses, and true institutions of our Hoosier history.
Now more than ever we need to support our local restaurants who’ve been hit hard by the pandemic. They’ve adjusted the way they run their business, from increasing their take-out to adjusting their dine-in hours. While it may not be the experience you’re used to, know that your support will help them keep their doors open!
_Here are some of Eric’s favorite places he wanted to share with you for this week’s One Indiana list!_
We hope they inspire you to chase down a great cut of beef from one of these local steakhouses in the near future. And while you’re visiting, please make sure to continue to follow all local health guidelines.
_Check out Eric’s list below!_ [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d0cd016de3a244e98a95a8b3a0aabd7c&_e=F2Uwd9P61jrnJ5sDaLVnjL3PwH-45OvrWYbUtIrjrvkHTz0_YWg3CNc1I3o7AuMehmrmdnxgGVL9HLfwrZDELfe5h3uXz8N56lwuVHVqSQsVBRDeFqYnDA8oq8GoneUZ2JhJUlpQZb-PJPJ1O4NWnRtM1rwOpEvALnJGB6Il6SSCSVVNjmg8_VnEB4rNmza3NQH_Gbdrr3mtyldDvo_yP7xxRrsShiGa08Vk7Sgs98A3BIStGQY5IYoIoGi9pB_GRmll9VpLwZML8Qx-A-j_Kr0jg0kxBCTX7t0BLc2ULhXfOmLSJrlrGRetXDlxOQGUuMfkEWQIZ7dQgC5YUQk7A50nMRggMdHCzWSc1JpkjAiSxXI7clxq6umB7tkdlaJNMjsQXPXzvUevzKOl00l_TKp4mWtAIVmjH0pqLbZDAaQ855ezWJM0E_zgFJh8IPZ6mMIpkdF7Io9N2MMSAESWzrQSeuYOszGd4B4gdd4jrcA%3D)
* **The Beef House, Covington** \- Family owned & operated since 1964, four generations of the Wright family continue to make the Beef House a special place today (the rolls!!). The Beef House has made a couple of appearances on our best food in Indiana lists — it’s just that good.
* **Bonge’s, Perkinsville** \- Serving Hoosiers since 1934, Bonge’s is a true Indiana classic and one of Indiana’s premier dining destinations. If you haven’t been, you have to add it to your steakhouse bucket list!
* **Broadway Tavern, Madison** \- Right in the heart of Madison’s “Landmark Historic District,” Broadway Tavern has been feeding hungry Hoosiers for more than 185 years as Indiana’s oldest tavern. It’s a unique part of Indiana history and a great place to get a steak if you’re in Madison!
* **Bynum’s, Martinsville** \- A great place to grab a steak with friends and family, it’s a must-visit if you’re passing through Martinsville.
* **Haub Steak House, Haubstadt** \- Housed in a century-old grain warehouse, this steakhouse is one of the most unique restaurants you will ever see. Be sure to stop by to try one of their amazing dry-aged, hand-trimmed steaks and enjoy the antique atmosphere.
* **Joseph Decuis, Roanoke** \- They are resurrecting the old ways with a ‘Farm to Fork’ experience. Their dinners live up to the ideals of the restaurant’s namesake, who described dining as “the stage for the bonding of family, friends and business associates.”
* **Kelsey’s Steak and Seafood, Valparaiso** \- Amazing food, better service. Kelsey’s serves award-winning steaks that are “Rarely This Well Done.”
* **Little Zagreb, Bloomington** \- Feeding hungry college students for 40 years, Janko’s is one of the best places to get a steak in Indiana. They are a Bloomington classic and well worth a visit.
* **The Red Geranium, New Harmony** \- One of the most charming and romantic restaurants in all of Indiana, you can enjoy a world-class steak while looking out over a panoramic view of a beautiful lake.
* **Ruth's Chris Steakhouse, Fort Wayne, Indianapolis & South Bend** \- When your steak comes out, don't touch the plate. It's heated to 500 degrees! This chain's locations in Fort Wayne, Indianapolis and South Bend are great for celebrating a special occasion.
* **Story Inn, Story** \- Established more than 150 years ago, the Story Inn has been serving delicious steaks to Hoosiers for more than a century. The inn sits on 18 acres of beautiful Indiana countryside that have been home to many weddings and special moments over the last 150 years.
* **St. Elmo’s, Indianapolis** \- The oldest Indianapolis steakhouse still in its original location, this James Beard Award-winning classic is one of the best. It’s even been named one of America’s 10 Great Classic Restaurants Well Worth A Visit!
* **1875: The Steakhouse, French Lick** \- Do you know the famous date this steakhouse was named after? 1875 celebrates the first running of the Kentucky Derby! Come check out one of French Lick’s signature restaurants and one of our state’s best steaks.

**Are you hungry yet? We sure are after making this list! **
Did we miss an iconic Indiana steakhouse or a hidden gem? Let us know! [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d0cd016de3a244e98a95a8b3a0aabd7c&_e=F2Uwd9P61jrnJ5sDaLVnjL3PwH-45OvrWYbUtIrjrvkHTz0_YWg3CNc1I3o7AuMehmrmdnxgGVL9HLfwrZDELfe5h3uXz8N56lwuVHVqSQsVBRDeFqYnDA8oq8GoneUZ2JhJUlpQZb-PJPJ1O4NWnRtM1rwOpEvALnJGB6Il6SSCSVVNjmg8_VnEB4rNmza3NQH_Gbdrr3mtyldDvo_yP7xxRrsShiGa08Vk7Sgs98A3BIStGQY5IYoIoGi9pB_GRmll9VpLwZML8Qx-A-j_Kn2Bnu_rVgstmBriZd82KpmoR0Ub6Ic6qOLbxBOHF99_JFsTXdlEA7K4Ckf2c85KFzjG_bLFVOvF5Y_lk6z1M6xqlH6r0HCjnn4kV5ar4bux-M0xYZ8EXR4FANN6ybNPj5h4J19xKJYfr32viRfs4ozdlqyIfJ3GR-Yvrlnsh853qlnOcrbbTp3gyNkCpgypbkp3eD0zAld6dkXLhJsVylE%3D) Thanks for reading,
Holcomb Crew | |

And while you’re visiting, please make sure to continue to follow all local health guidelines. Check out Eric’s list below! The Beef House, Covington \- Family owned & operated since 1964, four generations of the Wright family continue to make the Beef House a special place today (the rolls!!). The Beef House has made a couple of appearances on our best food in Indiana lists — it’s just that good. Bonge’s, Perkinsville \- Serving Hoosiers since 1934, Bonge’s is a true Indiana classic and one of Indiana’s premier dining destinations. If you haven’t been, you have to add it to your steakhouse bucket list! Broadway Tavern, Madison \- Right in the heart of Madison’s “Landmark Historic District,” Broadway Tavern has been feeding hungry Hoosiers for more than 185 years as Indiana’s oldest tavern. It’s a unique part of Indiana history and a great place to get a steak if you’re in Madison! Bynum’s, Martinsville \- A great place to grab a steak with friends and family, it’s a must-visit if you’re passing through Martinsville. Haub Steak House, Haubstadt \- Housed in a century-old grain warehouse, this steakhouse is one of the most unique restaurants you will ever see. Be sure to stop by to try one of their amazing dry-aged, hand-trimmed steaks and enjoy the antique atmosphere. Joseph Decuis, Roanoke \- They are resurrecting the old ways with a ‘Farm to Fork’ experience. Their dinners live up to the ideals of the restaurant’s namesake, who described dining as “the stage for the bonding of family, friends and business associates.” Kelsey’s Steak and Seafood, Valparaiso \- Amazing food, better service. Kelsey’s serves award-winning steaks that are “Rarely This Well Done.” Little Zagreb, Bloomington \- Feeding hungry college students for 40 years, Janko’s is one of the best places to get a steak in Indiana. They are a Bloomington classic and well worth a visit. The Red Geranium, New Harmony \- One of the most charming and romantic restaurants in all of Indiana, you can enjoy a world-class steak while looking out over a panoramic view of a beautiful lake. Ruth's Chris Steakhouse, Fort Wayne, Indianapolis & South Bend \- When your steak comes out, don't touch the plate. It's heated to 500 degrees! This chain's locations in Fort Wayne, Indianapolis and South Bend are great for celebrating a special occasion. Story Inn, Story \- Established more than 150 years ago, the Story Inn has been serving delicious steaks to Hoosiers for more than a century. The inn sits on 18 acres of beautiful Indiana countryside that have been home to many weddings and special moments over the last 150 years. St. Elmo’s, Indianapolis \- The oldest Indianapolis steakhouse still in its original location, this James Beard Award-winning classic is one of the best. It’s even been named one of America’s 10 Great Classic Restaurants Well Worth A Visit! 1875: The Steakhouse, French Lick \- Do you know the famous date this steakhouse was named after? 1875 celebrates the first running of the Kentucky Derby! Come check out one of French Lick’s signature restaurants and one of our state’s best steaks. Are you hungry yet? We sure are after making this list! ** Did we miss an iconic Indiana steakhouse or a hidden gem? Let us know! Thanks for reading, Holcomb Crew | | | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved. | | Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

We are running out of time, so we’ll keep this short.

Our FEC filing deadline is just a few hours away, and we are still short of our goal. But you can help us close the gap.
**[DONATE RIGHT NOW TO HELP US CRUSH THIS GOAL.>>>](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=b9ac3784b72d423fbf9982d392d23484&_e=fq6sVr-NpBDpR4tCoVUxI3hJAhTTkvU3rg2c-9-8IEJsbNypTMnB0GVSbj_WXodDVarFlZJXaX1v0PfDRMDsQQnCPji0l75vqW6r0onrOUVZx0XCAK2zAalBNxnoE8HYr3NjUquQ1t4VpjWWqNyxOB0KIjduoob211DIY5X_211R8dZ85h7DEbjtiTFATSBjIlPkdoM0B3yKEXFMjUNAKwmvgXBNMXbhCnc0akgywuH4cDXqmaELDYNl-XFhQb0AECWVVvZfTgHpK8qiorac4_eXKlyQw7n7BXY5luPJ5NX3uj2sangmJEH0vkHSx8wr9Jj4HkGGnwjomT4QkAs96488ZPQwlti93m_YoV1NbaXSa9jG6S7s3NrhlGqRK_BoVapQwVR8kqYB35S_35WPQjn50MxMm4wp5iF8di4j7jC-7Dc3fa710rz9vrvtR4aIWTtDm4wlzuL9Fq1kQn1lUvlWA4NsNlmfLo44jEBiX4A%3D)**

name: Ellen Foster, Campaign Manager
subject: Tonight (don't delete)

body:
We need to pick up the pace. |
---
Hi friend,

In a few hours, we'll close the books on the third quarter of 2020. We'll send our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission, and then they'll post them publicly for all to see.

**Friend, it is critical that we post HUGE numbers this quarter.**

_It's the last end-of-quarter fundraising report before Election Day -- one of our last chances to show the fundraising STRENGTH and MOMENTUM of this movement to elect Jon Ossoff._

**We have to hit our $200,000 grassroots fundraising goal by midnight, and we're still not quite there yet, friend._I'll be looking at these numbers when I put our budget together tomorrow. We can't be scaling back now, especially with Jon leading in the polls._**

**[So chip in whatever you can BY MIDNIGHT to show the country that Jon Ossoff is going to be Georgia's next Senator>>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e9a/5b2c1286/3bcf3c0f/25f271f0/1690341729/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_30_ellen_last_eoq?refcode=em_2020_09_30_ellen_last_eoq")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lynette=20Feenstra?=
subject: Only a few hours left - my husband Randy needs your help!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | Friend,
---
| With only a little more than a month to go until Election Day, we’re seeing candidates across the country and the state of Iowa making their final pitches to voters. Many will say something along the same lines: “I have what it takes to get it done”.

Most who say this are all talk.

Too many candidates see getting elected as the game. If they can just get enough votes, the rest is easy. That isn’t the case. To meaningfully affect change, it takes a lot more than just saying the right thing on the campaign trail to the right people. Delivering real results takes a lot more than a nice smile and a campaign slogan. It takes experience, knowledge, determination, a servant attitude, faith, and so much more that too many candidates are lacking.

I can promise you my husband, Randy, has everything it takes to actually get things done.

We’ve been married for 28 years, and in that time, I’ve seen him develop into the kind of leader that can actually deliver on what he promises – someone we can trust with the future of our state and our country. I’ve seen him as a student, a young businessman, a City Administrator, a Sunday school teacher, a volunteer EMT, and a State Senator, and I can tell you: the lessons he’s learned and the experience he’s gained from these life experiences has prepared him to take on this next challenge and deliver real results.

Our country and our state need leaders like Randy, and that’s why I’m asking for your support. We only need $1445 more to meet our goal for the end of the month, and our deadline is at 11:59 tonight! So please, consider chipping in!
---
| [Click here to contribute!](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=046b45e0fb&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Click here to contribute!")
---
| Your support means the world to us, and this campaign couldn’t have gotten this far without you; but we’ve almost reached the finish line, so let’s finish strong!

Thank you,
Lynette Feenstra
---
|
---
| | | PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
---
| Feenstra For Congress641 2nd StHull, IA 51239-7323
[Add us to your address book](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/vcard?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=5114b6cce8)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/profile?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=5114b6cce8&e=d48ad6f8f4) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=5114b6cce8&e=d48ad6f8f4&c=c7bb5d4111).

Be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=ec2a59a556&e=d48ad6f8f4), [Twitter](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=41f8544adb&e=d48ad6f8f4), and [Instagram](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=0050de44f5&e=d48ad6f8f4). If you have any suggestions, comments, complaints or feedback please send us your ideas [here](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=479b4ca0ee&e=d48ad6f8f4) or by replying to this email.

Want to get involved with our campaign? Sign up to volunteer [here](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=ebbaddf5fe&e=d48ad6f8f4).

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Last call before our midnight deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
There's simply too much at stake now.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8175%2E868730%2EvAhAYO) Friend, This is the last call. You know what's at stake. Governors are now all that is keeping the wolves from the door. You want progress? I'll fight for it -- but more importantly, we'll defend that progress. In this state, as long as I'm governor, health care will be protected for all citizens. The right to choose will always be safe here, and I will continue to fight to end the scourge of gun violence. But only if I'm reelected this year -- otherwise, we know what will happen next if my extremist, anti-science, right-wing opponent is elected. **That's why I'm asking for you to step up right now. We have a $75,000 end-of-month goal to hit by midnight, and we're just $8,645 short.[Ballots drop in about two weeks -- can you donate $5 or more right now so we leave it all on the field?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12148?t=4&akid=8175%2E868730%2EvAhAYO)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12149?t=5&akid=8175%2E868730%2EvAhAYO)
---

Very truly yours,
Jay

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: FW: We’re behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Common Good
body:
| | | Derek,
Since I emailed earlier today, nearly 200 grassroots supporters have stepped up to support my effort to help Democrats win Virginia in 2020.
**With the White House, Congress, and the Supreme Court riding on what happens in the Commonwealth, I can’t thank everyone enough for their support.**
With only a handful of hours left, we’re still $2,461 short of our end-of-quarter fundraising goal.
**_[Please rush a contribution of anything you can afford using the secure URL below. If you make your contribution before midnight tonight, it will be matched dollar for dollar, doubling your impact:](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkLs34ip987PAXxWSApnt61JGE0ZKTxQoJ44aigiqw8fFl0oToCx6vsIbUPvnct3Nte6qEXK0nV5dfpVmVIAp90I7WjvV4enKQ72OsNjDnPI4zy1WwMPAXv_Z9t7ovV8yMQeBMbz2MbjsZe8KX672mvdDEAveB-3OoGihS2IXdOJ1T8whm1GTOWe5nvKivFQdYzFXu4CRlm0OFiIyp7pqCg7AYzwrzqBj7dScVHH9jNQF-FuprtkW62PcCi-loYd15ZgJStl-PfMBgdX6SuiYjLQ/35m/W-W9_IyoRi-zdn3-7uyA3Q/h0/2uVjBXrZu_BG7hWqM8_TxtbQAykWWFFcBKyWWTLU7TI)_**

\-----Forwarded message-----
Derek, At midnight, we’re staring down the most important fundraising deadline of 2020.
**And with just hours to go we’re still $8,408 short of our end of quarter goal.**
If you watched Donald Trump’s clown show debate performance last night, then you know it’s more important than ever that Virginians do our part to help Joe Biden and Democrats win up and down the ballot.
[I’m counting on you to pitch in $25 or more right now to help put us over the top, Derek. **And, thanks to a group of donors, every contribution between now and the deadline will be matched, dollar for dollar:**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkLs34ip987PAXxWSApnt61JGE0ZKTxQoJ44aigiqw8fGz0vZSW-e0NShZSTOv1QZJb7EzicAEMklmS3sk0XoI9mHiGHKIxDnJ1oanMeie41w8M-994wCXCBQI9BJ4id6DQhhBAWb80g_t-2AA-NiiX2NapxUJQBZWltT_kaUg5Y9JWPrlk0MmsokQlatRJ1cCic-rvoEJLWCJNcmj0IxgH1A-WJMoXluHOyGxdAruRcjmVQgaXiQiycwwKNLi-i9dqMerRnFQbIGMDpw62uez6w/35m/W-W9_IyoRi-zdn3-7uyA3Q/h2/pW9Kg9Cx7PK13AwVpIEJbmgQE4fy-5xZWSuacTDbsmA)******

**
With only weeks until November 3rd, Virginia is still a critical battleground in the fight to win the White House, take back Congress and save the Supreme Court.**

Need proof?

Just last week Trump was in Newport News for one of his super spreader MAGA rallies.

And Republican Super PACs keep pumping millions into the Commonwealth. That includes spending nearly a million dollars just last week to help the GOP take back the House.

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b202/18e32a7f/4ac09e1a/7b20ac93/981366091/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b202/18e32a7f/4ac09e1a/7b20ac90/981366091/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b202/18e32a7f/4ac09e1a/7b20ac91/981366091/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b202/18e32a7f/4ac09e1a/7b20ac9d/981366091/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b202/18e32a7f/4ac09e1a/7b20ac9f/981366091/VEsEBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b202/18e32a7f/4ac09e1a/7b20ac96/981366091/VEsEBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

name: Mark Warner
subject: re: Thank you for being on this team.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Just wanted to make sure you saw my last note, Derek.

There's so much at stake between now and Election Day on November 3rd. We're in the midst of an ongoing global pandemic, a changing economy, and a national reckoning with systemic racism.

This election is about what kind of country we are -- and what kind of country we want to be. Casting your ballot this year isn't just about protecting the progress we've made, it's about rebuilding our country and our economy after the damage that this pandemic and four years of Donald Trump's failed leadership have wrought. I believe we have what it takes to keep Virginia blue and turn the tide in our country, but I need your help.

So if you're with me, can you chip in a few dollars to keep this campaign moving forward? I can't do this without your support.

Here's the donation link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-homestretch.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da61/53d9897e/55bc12d5/1c88e42a/1767130783/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg0MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-homestretch?refcode=20200930_f_2_nd__841__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Thank you. | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da61/53d9897e/55bc12d5/1c88e429/1767130783/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg0MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-homestretch?refcode=20200930_f_2_nd__841__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")
---
-- Mark Warner

\---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **Mark Warner**
Subject: Thank you for being on this team.
> Friend --
>
> I am so inspired by the folks in Virginia. We're facing an incredibly challenging time -- a global pandemic, a reckoning with racism in our country, and a rapidly changing economy. But, as I've checked in with folks across the Commonwealth, I've seen resilience and dedication to protecting the progress we've made.
>
> This campaign has felt different from any other; we're not able to connect in the same ways. One of my favorite parts of campaigning is getting to hear directly from voters, and I have to admit that I've been missing the usual parades and large rallies. Still, whether it's been on Zoom or during socially distanced events, the dedication to keeping Virginia blue is palpable. And I am so grateful for your support -- for me, and for Democrats up and down the ticket.
>
> We had record turnout in Virginia on Super Tuesday, and I know that we can match it based on the enthusiasm I've seen from folks in every corner of the Commonwealth. In Virginia, we say this every year, but it's really true this time: This election is one of the most important in our lifetimes. It's about what kind of country we are -- and what kind of country we want to be. No matter how you're planning to vote this year: by mail with a no-excuse absentee ballot, early in-person, or in-person on Election Day, it's so critical that you do cast your ballot. And once you've made your plan to vote, check in with your friends to make sure they know how to make their voices heard too.
> [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da61/53d9897e/55bc12d5/1c88e428/1767130783/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg0MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-homestretch?refcode=20200930_f_2_nd__841__&refcode2=graphic2&amount=5")
> ---
> Volunteers on a recent yard sign distribution day (left) and members of Team Warner outside of my first debate with my GOP opponent (right).
> **I feel it every day, but I don 't say it enough: I love this team.** Thank you for being a part of it. I am so grateful for your support and so thankful you're on this journey with me. If you believe in keeping Virginia blue and have been thinking about supporting the campaign, now is the time. We've got fewer than 40 days until Election Day, and we're counting on your support in the home stretch.
>
> Here's the donation link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-homestretch](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da61/53d9897e/55bc12d5/1c88e417/1767130783/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg0MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-homestretch?refcode=20200930_f_2_nd__841__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**.
>
> Thank you for being on the team. Let's go out and win this.
> [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da61/53d9897e/55bc12d5/1c88e416/1767130783/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg0MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-homestretch?refcode=20200930_f_2_nd__841__&refcode2=graphic3&amount=5")
> ---
> -- Mark Warner
>
>
> [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da61/53d9897e/55bc12d5/1c88e415/1767130783/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg0MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-homestretch?refcode=20200930_f_2_nd__841__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
> ---
>
|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da61/53d9897e/55bc12d5/1c88e414/1767130783/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")
